title: Elderly-Contextual Data Augmentation via Speech Synthesis for Elderly ASR
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, under review at IEEE Signal Processing Letters
summary: Despite recent progress in automatic speech recognition (ASR), elderly ASR (EASR) remains challenging due to limited training data and the distinct acoustic and linguistic characteristics of elderly speech. In this work, we address data scarcity in EASR through a data augmentation pipeline that combines large language model (LLM)-based transcript paraphrasing with text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis. Given an elderly speech dataset, the LLM first generates elderly-contextual paraphrases of the original transcripts, and the TTS model then synthesizes corresponding speech using elderly reference speakers. The resulting synthetic audio-text pairs are merged with the original data to fine-tune Whisper without architectural modification. We further analyze the effects of augmentation ratio and reference-speaker composition in low-resource EASR. Experiments on English and Korean elderly speech datasets from speakers aged 70 and above show that the proposed method consistently improves performance over conventional augmentation baselines, achieving up to a 58.2% reduction in word error rate (WER) compared with the Whisper baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型文本转写和语音合成的数据增强方法，有效解决了老年人语音识别数据稀缺问题，在英语和韩语老年人语音数据集上将词错误率降低了58.2%。
AI.motivation: 老年人语音识别面临训练数据有限和老年人语音特有的声学语言学特征双重挑战，尽管自动语音识别技术已有进展，但EASR仍是一个困难问题。
AI.method: 构建数据增强管道：首先使用大语言模型对原始转录文本进行老年人语境下的改写，然后通过文本到语音模型使用老年人参考说话人合成对应语音，最后将合成音频-文本对与原始数据合并来微调Whisper模型。
AI.result: 在70岁以上说话人的英语和韩语老年人语音数据集上，该方法相比传统增强基线持续提升性能，与Whisper基线相比最高降低了58.2%的词错误率。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明LLM-based转录改写结合TTS合成的增强策略是解决低资源老年人语音识别数据稀缺问题的有效方案，无需对模型架构进行修改即可实现显著性能提升。

title: Large Language Models Explore by Latent Distilling
summary: Generating diverse responses is crucial for test-time scaling of large language models (LLMs), yet standard stochastic sampling mostly yields surface-level lexical variation, limiting semantic exploration. In this paper, we propose Exploratory Sampling (ESamp), a decoding approach that explicitly encourages semantic diversity during generation. ESamp is motivated by the well-known observation that neural networks tend to make lower-error predictions on inputs similar to those encountered before, and incur higher prediction error on novel ones. Building on this property, we train a lightweight Distiller at test time to predict deep-layer hidden representations of the LLM from its shallow-layer representations to model the LLM's depth-wise representation transitions. During decoding, the Distiller continuously adapts to the mappings induced by the current generation context. ESamp uses the prediction error as a novelty signal to reweight candidate token extensions conditioned on the current prefix, thereby biasing decoding toward less-explored semantic patterns. ESamp is implemented with an asynchronous training--inference pipeline, with less than 5% worst case overhead (1.2% in the optimized release). Empirical results show that ESamp significantly boosts the Pass@k efficiency of reasoning models, showing superior or comparable performance to strong stochastic and heuristic baselines. Notably, ESamp achieves robust generalization across mathematics, science, and code generation benchmarks and breaks the trade-off between diversity and coherence in creative writing. Our code has released at: https://github.com/LinesHogan/tLLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了探索性采样(ESamp)方法，通过训练一个轻量级蒸馏器来预测LLM深层表示，利用预测误差作为新颖性信号重新加权候选词，以促进语义多样性，显著提升推理模型的Pass@k效率。
AI.motivation: 现有随机采样方法主要产生表层词汇变化，限制了语义探索。基于神经网络在相似输入上预测误差较小、在新颖输入上误差较大的观察，作者提出需要在生成过程中显式鼓励语义多样性。
AI.method: 在测试时训练一个轻量级蒸馏器，从LLM浅层表示预测深层表示，建模深度表示转换。解码过程中，蒸馏器持续适应当前生成上下文的映射，使用预测误差作为新颖性信号重新加权基于当前前缀的候选词扩展，使解码偏向较少探索的语义模式。
AI.result: ESamp显著提升推理模型的Pass@k效率，在数学、科学和代码生成基准测试上实现鲁棒泛化，在创意写作中打破多样性与连贯性的权衡，开销低于5%(优化版本1.2%)。
AI.conclusion: ESamp通过探索性采样有效促进语义多样性，在多个领域实现性能提升，为LLM的测试时扩展提供了新的解码策略，代码已开源。

title: GAIA-v2-LILT: Multilingual Adaptation of Agent Benchmark beyond Translation
summary: Agent benchmarks remain largely English-centric, while their multilingual versions are often built with machine translation (MT) and limited post-editing. We argue that, for agentic tasks, this minimal workflow can easily break benchmark validity through query-answer misalignment or culturally off-target context. We propose a refined workflow for adapting English benchmarks into multiple languages with explicit functional alignment, cultural alignment, and difficulty calibration using both automated checks and human review. Using this workflow, we introduce GAIA-v2-LILT, a re-audited multilingual extension of GAIA covering five non-English languages. In experiments, our workflow improves agent success rates by up to 32.7% over minimally translated versions, bringing the closest audited setting to within 3.1% of English performance while substantial gaps remain in many other cases. This indicates that a substantial share of the multilingual performance gap is benchmark-induced measurement error, motivating task-level alignment when adapting English benchmarks across languages. The data is available as part of the MAPS package at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Fujitsu-FRE/MAPS/viewer/GAIA-v2-LILT. We also release the code used in our experiments at https://github.com/lilt/gaia-v2-lilt.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个改进的工作流程，用于将英文智能体基准适配到多语言版本，通过功能对齐、文化对齐和难度校准来提高基准的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的多语言智能体基准主要依赖机器翻译，缺乏充分的后编辑，这会导致查询-答案不匹配和文化语境偏差，破坏基准的有效性。
AI.method: 提出了一个包含功能对齐、文化对齐和难度校准的精细化工作流程，结合自动化检查和人工审查，将英文GAIA基准适配为覆盖5种非英语语言的GAIA-v2-LILT。
AI.result: 使用该工作流程的基准版本相比最小翻译版本，智能体成功率提高了32.7%，使最接近的审查设置与英语性能差距仅3.1%，证明了多语言性能差距很大部分是由基准引起的测量误差。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，在跨语言适配英文基准时，需要在任务级别进行对齐，而不仅仅是简单的翻译，这对于准确评估多语言智能体性能至关重要。

title: ADE: Adaptive Dictionary Embeddings -- Scaling Multi-Anchor Representations to Large Language Models
comment: 13 pages (9 pages main text + 4 pages appendix), 6 tables, 1 algorithm
summary: Word embeddings are fundamental to natural language processing, yet traditional approaches represent each word with a single vector, creating representational bottlenecks for polysemous words and limiting semantic expressiveness. While multi-anchor representations have shown promise by representing words as combinations of multiple vectors, they have been limited to small-scale models due to computational inefficiency and lack of integration with modern transformer architectures. We introduce Adaptive Dictionary Embeddings (ADE), a framework that successfully scales multi-anchor word representations to large language models. ADE makes three key contributions: (1) Vocabulary Projection (VP), which transforms the costly two-stage anchor lookup into a single efficient matrix operation; (2) Grouped Positional Encoding (GPE), a novel positional encoding scheme where anchors of the same word share positional information, preserving semantic coherence while enabling anchor-level variation; and (3) context-aware anchor reweighting, which leverages self-attention to dynamically compose anchor contributions based on sequence context. We integrate these components into the Segment-Aware Transformer (SAT), which provides context-aware reweighting of anchor contributions at inference time. We evaluate ADE on AG News and DBpedia-14 text classification benchmarks. With 98.7% fewer trainable parameters than DeBERTa-v3-base, ADE surpasses DeBERTa on DBpedia-14 (98.06% vs. 97.80%) and approaches it on AG News (90.64% vs. 94.50%), while compressing the embedding layer over 40x -- demonstrating that multi-anchor representations are a practical and parameter-efficient alternative to single-vector embeddings in modern transformer architectures.

AI.tldr: 自适应词典嵌入(ADE)将多锚点词表示成功扩展到大型语言模型，用98.7%更少参数达到或超越DeBERTa性能，实现40倍嵌入层压缩。
AI.motivation: 传统词嵌入用单一向量表示词语存在语义表达瓶颈，特别是多义词；现有多锚点表示方法因计算效率低和与transformer架构不兼容而仅限于小规模模型。
AI.method: ADE框架包含三个核心技术：(1)词汇投影(VP)将两阶段锚点查找转换为单矩阵运算；(2)分组位置编码(GPE)让同词锚点共享位置信息；(3)基于自注意力的上下文感知锚点重加权，整合到分段感知transformer中。
AI.result: 在AG News和DBpedia-14分类任务上，ADE仅用DeBERTa-v3-base 1.3%的参数，在DBpedia-14上超越DeBERTa(98.06% vs 97.80%)，在AG News上接近其性能(90.64% vs 94.50%)，嵌入层压缩40倍。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明多锚点表示在现代transformer架构中是单向量嵌入的实用且参数高效的替代方案，为提升语言模型语义表达能力开辟了新途径。

title: ESICA: A Scalable Framework for Text-Guided 3D Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Text guided 3D medical image segmentation offers a flexible alternative to class based and spatial prompt based models by allowing users to specify regions of interest directly in natural language. This paradigm avoids reliance on predefined label sets, reduces ambiguous outputs, and aligns more naturally with clinical workflows. However, existing text guided frameworks are often computationally expensive, exhibit weak text volume feature alignment, and fail to capture fine anatomical details. We propose ESICA, a lightweight and scalable framework that addresses these challenges through three innovations: (1) a similarity matrix based mask prediction formulation that enhances semantic alignment, (2) an efficient decomposed decoder with adapter modules for accurate volumetric decoding, and (3) a two pass refinement strategy that sharpens boundaries and resolves uncertain regions. To improve training stability and generalization, ESICA adopts a two stage scheme consisting of positive only pretraining followed by balanced fine tuning. On the CVPR BiomedSegFM benchmark spanning five imaging modalities (CT, MRI, PET, ultrasound, and microscopy), ESICA achieves state of the art segmentation accuracy, while the compact ESICA4 Lite variant attains similar segmentation performance with substantially fewer parameters, yielding a superior efficiency accuracy trade off. Our framework advances text guided segmentation toward efficient, scalable, and clinically deployable systems. Code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/mirthAI/ESICA.

AI.tldr: ESICA是一个轻量级、可扩展的文本引导3D医学图像分割框架，通过创新的相似性矩阵mask预测、高效分解解码器和双阶段优化策略，在多种医学影像模态上实现了最先进的分割精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本引导3D医学图像分割框架存在计算成本高、文本与体积特征对齐弱、无法捕捉精细解剖细节等问题，限制了其在临床工作流程中的实际应用。
AI.method: ESICA框架包含三个核心创新：(1)基于相似性矩阵的mask预测方法增强语义对齐；(2)带有适配器模块的高效分解解码器实现精确体积解码；(3)双通道优化策略锐化边界并解决不确定区域；采用正样本预训练和平衡微调的两阶段训练方案。
AI.result: 在CVPR BiomedSegFM基准测试(涵盖CT、MRI、PET、超声和显微镜五种成像模态)上，ESICA实现了最先进的分割精度；其轻量级变体ESICA4 Lite以更少参数获得相似性能，具有优异的效率-精度平衡。
AI.conclusion: ESICA框架推动了文本引导分割向高效、可扩展和临床可部署系统的发展，为医学图像分割提供了灵活且实用的解决方案。

title: Independent-Component-Based Encoding Models of Brain Activity During Story Comprehension
summary: Encoding models provide a powerful framework for linking continuous stimulus features to neural activity; however, traditional voxelwise approaches are limited by measurement noise, inter-subject variability, and redundancy arising from spatially correlated voxels encoding overlapping neural signals. Here, we propose an independent component (IC)-based encoding framework that dissociates stimulus-driven and noise-driven signals in fMRI data. We decompose continuous fMRI data from naturalistic story listening into ICs using one subset of the data, and train encoding models on independent data to predict IC time series from large language model representations of linguistic input. Across subjects, a subset of ICs exhibited consistently high predictivity. These ICs were spatially and temporally consistent across subjects and included cognitive networks known to respond during story listening (auditory and language). Auditory component time series were strongly correlated with acoustic stimulus features, highlighting the interpretability of identified component time series. Components identified as noise or motion-related artifacts by ICA-AROMA showed uniformly poor predictive performance, confirming that highly predicted components reflect genuine stimulus-related neural signals rather than confounds. Overall, IC-based encoding models enable analyses at the level of functional networks, accommodating the variability in network locations across individuals and providing interpretable results that are easy to compare across subjects.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于独立成分分析的编码模型框架，通过分离刺激驱动和噪声驱动的fMRI信号，实现了在功能网络层面进行神经编码分析，解决了传统体素级方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统的体素级编码模型存在测量噪声、被试间变异性以及空间相关体素编码重叠信号导致的冗余等问题，需要新的方法来更有效地分析fMRI数据。
AI.method: 使用独立成分分析(ICA)将自然故事聆听的连续fMRI数据分解为独立成分，然后在独立数据上训练编码模型，用大型语言模型表征的语言输入来预测IC时间序列。
AI.result: 部分ICs在不同被试间表现出一致的高预测性，这些成分在空间和时间上具有一致性，包含了故事聆听期间活跃的认知网络（听觉和语言网络），听觉成分时间序列与声学刺激特征强相关，而被ICA-AROMA识别为噪声的成分预测性能较差。
AI.conclusion: 基于IC的编码模型能够在功能网络层面进行分析，适应个体间网络位置的变异性，提供易于跨被试比较的可解释结果，有效区分真实的神经信号和噪声干扰。

title: Learning Illumination Control in Diffusion Models
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026 ReALM-GEN Workshop on Diffusion Models. Project Website: https://nishitanand.github.io/relighting-diffusion-website
summary: Controlling illumination in images is essential for photography and visual content creation. While closed-source models have demonstrated impressive illumination control, open-source alternatives either require heavy control inputs like depth maps or do not release their data and code. We present a fully open-source and reproducible pipeline for learning illumination control in diffusion models. Our approach builds a data engine that transforms well-lit images into supervised training triplets consisting of a poorly-illuminated input image, a natural language lighting instruction, and a well-illuminated output image. We finetune a diffusion model on this data and demonstrate significant improvements over baseline SD 1.5, SDXL, and FLUX.1-dev models in perceptual similarity, structural similarity, and identity preservation. Our work provides a reproducible solution built entirely with open-source tools and publicly available data. We release all our code, data, and model weights publicly.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个完全开源的、可复现的扩散模型光照控制流水线，通过自动构建训练数据集并在多个开源模型上进行微调，显著提升了图像光照控制效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的光照控制模型要么是闭源的，要么需要复杂的控制输入（如深度图），缺乏真正可用的开源解决方案，限制了研究者和开发者的使用。
AI.method: 构建数据引擎将光照良好图像转换成监控训练三元组（光照不佳输入图像+自然语言光照指令+光照良好输出图像），然后微调扩散模型。
AI.result: 在感知相似性、结构相似性和身份保持方面显著超越了SD 1.5、SDXL和FLUX.1-dev等基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 提供完全基于开源工具和公开数据的可复现解决方案，所有代码、数据和模型权重均已公开，促进了开源光照控制研究的发展。

title: BenchGuard: Who Guards the Benchmarks? Automated Auditing of LLM Agent Benchmarks
summary: As benchmarks grow in complexity, many apparent agent failures are not failures of the agent at all - they are failures of the benchmark itself: broken specifications, implicit assumptions, and rigid evaluation scripts that penalize valid alternative approaches. We propose employing frontier LLMs as systematic auditors of evaluation infrastructure, and realize this vision through BenchGuard, the first automated auditing framework for task-oriented, execution-based agent benchmarks. BenchGuard cross-verifies all benchmark artifacts via structured LLM protocols, optionally incorporating agent solutions or execution traces as additional diagnostic evidence. Deployed on two prominent scientific benchmarks, BenchGuard identified 12 author-confirmed issues in ScienceAgentBench - including fatal errors rendering tasks unsolvable - and exactly matched 83.3% of expert-identified issues on the BIXBench Verified-50 subset, catching defects that prior human review missed entirely. A full audit of 50 complex bioinformatics tasks costs under USD 15, making automated benchmark auditing a practical and valuable complement to human review. These findings point toward AI-assisted benchmark development, where frontier models serve not only as subjects of evaluation but as active participants in validating the evaluation infrastructure itself.

AI.tldr: BenchGuard是首个使用前沿LLM对面向任务的执行型智能体基准进行自动化审计的框架，能以低成本识别基准设计中的缺陷和错误。
AI.motivation: 随着基准测试变得日益复杂，许多看似智能体失败的案例实际上是基准本身的问题：包括错误的规范说明、隐含的假设以及僵化的评估脚本，这些会惩罚有效的替代解决方案。
AI.method: 提出使用前沿LLM作为评估基础设施的系统审计器，通过结构化的LLM协议交叉验证所有基准组件，可选择性地整合智能体解决方案或执行轨迹作为额外的诊断证据。
AI.result: 在ScienceAgentBench上识别出12个作者确认的问题（包括使任务无法解决的致命错误），在BIXBench Verified-50子集上83.3%准确匹配专家识别的问题，发现了人工审查完全遗漏的缺陷。完整审计50个复杂生物信息学任务的成本低于15美元。
AI.conclusion: 自动化基准审计已成为人工审查的实用且有价值的补充，为AI辅助基准开发铺平了道路，其中前沿模型不仅是评估的对象，更是验证评估基础设施的积极参与者。

title: VibeToken: Scaling 1D Image Tokenizers and Autoregressive Models for Dynamic Resolution Generations
comment: Accepted at CVPR'26 | Project Page: https://github.com/SonyResearch/VibeToken
summary: We introduce an efficient, resolution-agnostic autoregressive (AR) image synthesis approach that generalizes to arbitrary resolutions and aspect ratios, narrowing the gap to diffusion models at scale. At its core is VibeToken, a novel resolution-agnostic 1D Transformer-based image tokenizer that encodes images into a dynamic, user-controllable sequence of 32-256 tokens, achieving a state-of-the-art efficiency and performance trade-off. Building on VibeToken, we present VibeToken-Gen, a class-conditioned AR generator with out-of-the-box support for arbitrary resolutions while requiring significantly fewer compute resources. Notably, VibeToken-Gen synthesizes 1024x1024 images using only 64 tokens and achieves 3.94 gFID; by comparison, a diffusion-based state-of-the-art alternative requires 1,024 tokens and attains 5.87 gFID. In contrast to fixed-resolution AR models such as LlamaGen -- whose inference FLOPs grow quadratically with resolution (11T FLOPs at 1024x1024) -- VibeToken-Gen maintains a constant 179G FLOPs (63.4x efficient) independent of resolution. We hope VibeToken can help unlock the wide adoption of AR visual generative models in production use cases.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种高效的、与分辨率无关的自回归图像合成方法VibeToken，通过动态token序列实现任意分辨率生成，在1024x1024分辨率下仅需64个token，计算效率比传统方法提升63.4倍。
AI.motivation: 解决传统自回归模型只能在固定分辨率工作、计算量随分辨率平方增长的问题，缩小与扩散模型在大规模图像生成方面的差距。
AI.method: 开发了VibeToken——一种分辨率无关的1D Transformer图像分词器，可将图像编码为32-256个动态可控token序列；基于此构建VibeToken-Gen，支持任意分辨率生成的类条件自回归生成器。
AI.result: 在1024x1024图像生成中仅需64个token达到3.94 gFID，而扩散模型需1024个token仅达5.87 gFID；计算量恒定在179G FLOPs，比LlamaGen的11T FLOPs提升63.4倍效率。
AI.conclusion: VibeToken为自回归视觉生成模型在生产环境中的广泛应用提供了可能，实现了分辨率无关的高效图像生成。

title: Dynamic Decision Learning: Test-Time Evolution for Abnormality Grounding in Rare Diseases
summary: Clinical abnormality grounding for rare diseases is often hindered by data scarcity, making supervised fine-tuning impractical and single-pass inference highly unstable. We propose Dynamic Decision Learning (DDL), a framework that enables frozen large vision-language models (LVLMs) to refine their decisions across both language and visual spaces by optimizing instructions and consolidating predictions under visual perturbations. This process improves localization quality and produces a consensus-based reliability score that quantifies model confidence. Results on brain imaging benchmarks, including a rare-disease dataset with 281 pathology types across models ranging from 3B to 72B parameters, show that DDL improves mAP@75 by up to 105% on rare-disease cases and outperforms adaptation baselines and supervised fine-tuning. Furthermore, DDL demonstrates stronger calibration between reliability scores and localization accuracy under severe distribution shifts and increasing task difficulty. Code is available at: https://lijunrio.github.io/DDL/

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态决策学习(DDL)框架，通过优化指令和整合视觉扰动下的预测，使冻结的大规模视觉-语言模型能够在罕见疾病临床异常定位中实现跨语言和视觉空间的决策精化，显著提升了定位质量和模型校准性能。
AI.motivation: 罕见疾病的临床异常定位面临数据稀缺问题，这使得监督微调不切实际，且单次推理极不稳定，需要一种无需大量标注数据就能提升模型性能的方法。
AI.method: DDL框架通过优化指令和在视觉扰动下整合预测来改进决策过程，同时生成基于共识的可靠性评分来量化模型置信度，整个过程中保持大型视觉-语言模型参数冻结。
AI.result: 在脑成像基准测试(包含281种病理类型的罕见疾病数据集)上，DDL将罕见疾病案例的mAP@75提升了高达105%，优于适配基线和监督微调，并在严重的分布偏移和任务难度增加时展现出更强的可靠性评分校准能力。
AI.conclusion: DDL为数据稀缺场景下的罕见疾病异常定位提供了有效解决方案，通过动态优化决策过程和可靠性评估机制，实现了模型性能和稳定性显著提升，无需修改原始模型参数。

title: Interactive Episodic Memory with User Feedback
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project Page: https://nsubedi11.github.io/refocus
summary: In episodic memory with natural language queries (EM-NLQ), a user may ask a question (e.g., "Where did I place the mug?") that requires searching a long egocentric video, captured from the user's perspective, to find the moment that answers it. However, queries can be ambiguous or incomplete, leading to incorrect responses. Current methods ignore this key aspect and address EM-NLQ in a one-shot setup, limiting their applicability in real-world scenarios. In this work, we address this gap and introduce the Episodic Memory with Questions and Feedback task (EM-QnF). Here, the user can provide feedback on the model's initial prediction or add more information (e.g., "Before this. I'm looking for the big blue mug not the white one"), helping the model refine its predictions interactively. To this end, we collect datasets for feedback-based interaction and propose a lightweight training scheme that avoids expensive sequential optimization. We also introduce a plug-and-play Feedback ALignment Module (FALM) that enables existing EM-NLQ models to incorporate user feedback effectively. Our approach significantly improves over the state of the art on three challenging benchmarks and is better than or competitive with commercial large vision-language models while remaining efficient. Evaluation with human-generated feedback shows that it generalizes well to real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EM-QnF任务，允许用户通过反馈和追问来提高记忆查询的准确性，并设计了轻量级的FALM模块，显著提升了现有模型在自然语言查询视频记忆中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有的自然语言查询 episodic memory (EM-NLQ) 方法采用一次性查询，无法处理模糊或不完整的查询，限制了在真实场景中的应用。用户需要能够通过反馈和追问来帮助模型准确理解查询意图。
AI.method: 1) 提出EM-QnF任务框架，支持交互式反馈；2) 收集基于反馈交互的数据集；3) 设计轻量级训练方案，避免昂贵的序列优化；4) 开发即插即用的FALM模块，使现有EM-NLQ模型能有效整合用户反馈。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的基准测试中，该方法显著超越了现有技术水平，性能优于或媲美商业大型视觉语言模型，同时保持高效率。人类反馈评估表明该方法在真实场景中具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入交互式反馈机制和轻量级FALM模块，成功解决了传统EM-NLQ方法的局限性，为构建更实用的人机交互记忆系统提供了有效解决方案。

title: A Survey on LLM-based Conversational User Simulation
comment: Submitted in August 2025. MOD-81000 approved survey
summary: User simulation has long played a vital role in computer science due to its potential to support a wide range of applications. Language, as the primary medium of human communication, forms the foundation of social interaction and behavior. Consequently, simulating conversational behavior has become a key area of study. Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have significantly catalyzed progress in this domain by enabling high-fidelity generation of synthetic user conversation. In this paper, we survey recent advancements in LLM-based conversational user simulation. We introduce a novel taxonomy covering user granularity and simulation objectives. Additionally, we systematically analyze core techniques and evaluation methodologies. We aim to keep the research community informed of the latest advancements in conversational user simulation and to further facilitate future research by identifying open challenges and organizing existing work under a unified framework.

AI.tldr: 本文调研了基于大语言模型的对话用户模拟最新进展，提出了涵盖用户粒度和模拟目标的新分类法，并分析了核心技术与评估方法。
AI.motivation: 语言是人类交流的主要媒介，模拟对话行为对计算机科学多个应用领域至关重要。随着大语言模型的快速发展，高保真合成用户对话生成取得重大突破，亟需系统性的综述来整合该领域的最新进展。
AI.method: 通过提出创新性的分类框架（用户粒度+模拟目标），系统梳理LLM驱动的对话用户模拟核心技术，深入分析现有评估方法论，并在统一框架下组织现有工作。
AI.result: 完成了该领域的系统性调研，建立了新的分类体系，明确了当前的技术方法和评估手段，为研究者提供了清晰的研究现状图谱。
AI.conclusion: 通过识别开放性挑战和组织现有研究成果，为对话用户模拟的未来研究提供了方向指引，有助于推动该领域的进一步发展。

title: Agentic AI for Remote Sensing: Technical Challenges and Research Directions
summary: Earth Observation (EO) is moving beyond static prediction toward multi-step analytical workflows that require coordinated reasoning over data, tools, and geospatial state. While foundation models and vision-language models have expanded representation learning and language-grounded interaction for remote sensing, and agentic AI has demonstrated long-horizon reasoning and external tool use, EO is not a straightforward extension of generic agentic AI. EO workflows operate over georeferenced, multi-modal, and temporally structured data, where operations such as reprojection, resampling, compositing, and aggregation actively transform the underlying state and can constrain subsequent analysis. As a result, errors may propagate silently across steps, and correctness depends not only on internal coherence, but also on geospatial consistency, temporally valid comparisons, and physical validity. This position paper argues that these challenges are structural rather than incidental. We identify the implicit assumptions commonly made in generic agentic models, analyze how they break in geospatial workflows, and characterize the resulting failure modes in multi-step EO pipelines. We then outline design principles for EO-native agents centered on structured geospatial state, tool-aware reasoning, verifier-guided execution, and learning objectives aligned with geospatial and physical validity. Finally, we present research directions spanning EO-specific benchmarks, hybrid supervised and reinforcement learning, constrained self-improvement, and trajectory-level evaluation beyond final-answer accuracy. Building reliable geospatial agents therefore requires rethinking agent design around the physical, geospatial, and workflow constraints that govern EO analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文论证地球观测工作流的结构性挑战需要重新设计基于地理空间原生的智能体，而非简单扩展通用AI代理。
AI.motivation: 地球观测正向多步骤分析工作流发展，但传统的通用AI代理无法处理地理空间数据特有的多模态、时空结构性和状态转换特性，导致错误在工作流中静默传播。
AI.method: 分析通用代理在地理空间工作流中的失效模式，提出以结构化地理空间状态、工具感知推理、验证器引导执行为核心的地理空间原生代理设计原则。
AI.result: 识别并归类了多步骤地球观测管线的失效模式，建立了面向地理空间一致性和物理有效性的代理设计框架。
AI.conclusion: 构建可靠的地理空间智能体需要围绕地球观测分析的物理、地理空间和工作流约束来重新思考代理设计，并提出了相应的研究方向和评估标准。

title: Dont Stop Early: Scalable Enterprise Deep Research with Controlled Information Flow and Evidence-Aware Termination
summary: Enterprise deep research often fails to produce decision-ready reports due to uneven information coverage, context explosion, and premature stopping. We propose a scalable Enterprise Deep Research (EDR) architecture to address these failures. Our system (i) decomposes requests into coverage-driven objectives via outline generation with reflection, (ii) localizes context with dependency-guided execution and explicit information sharing, and (iii) enforces evidence-based completion criteria so agents iteratively collect information until sufficiency conditions are met. We evaluate on an internal sales enablement task and the public DeepResearch Bench benchmark, where our proposed system design achieves the strongest overall performance compared with competitive deep-research baselines. The results show that dependency-controlled context and explicit evidence sufficiency criteria reduce premature stopping and improve the consistency and depth of enterprise research outputs.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种可扩展的企业深度研究(EDR)架构，通过覆盖驱动的目标分解、依赖引导的上下文定位和基于证据的完成标准，解决了企业深度研究中的信息覆盖不均、上下文爆炸和过早停止问题。
AI.motivation: 企业深度研究经常因为信息覆盖不均、上下文爆炸和过早停止等问题，无法产生决策就绪的报告，这些失败限制了研究成果的实用价值和决策支持能力。
AI.method: EDR系统的核心技术包括：(i)通过大纲生成和反思将请求分解为覆盖驱动的目标；(ii)使用依赖引导的执行和显式信息共享来定位上下文；(iii)强制执行基于证据的完成标准，使代理迭代收集信息直到满足充分性条件。
AI.result: 在内部销售赋能任务和公共DeepResearch Bench基准测试中，所提出的系统设计相比竞争性深度研究基线取得了最强的整体性能。依赖控制的上下文和显式证据充分性标准有效减少了过早停止，提高了企业研究成果的一致性和深度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过结构化的目标分解、智能的上下文管理和严格的证据验证，可以显著提升企业深度研究的质量和可靠性，为企业决策提供更好的支持。

title: Subjective Portrait Region Cropping in Landscape Videos with Temporal Annotation Smoothing
comment: Under Review in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing. The code, models and dataset will be available at: https://github.com/steven413d/LIVE-YT-VideoCropping
summary: With the rise of mobile video consumption on diverse handheld display resolutions and orientation modes, altering videos to aspect ratios poses challenges. Static cropping and border padding often compromises visual quality, while warping may distort a video's intended meaning. Here we advocate for a more effective approach: cropping significant regions within video frames in a temporal manner, while minimizing distortion and preserving essential content. One barrier to solving this problem is the lack of sufficiently large-scale database devoted to informing these tasks. Towards filling this gap, we introduce the LIVE-YouTube Video Cropping (LIVE-YT VC) database, featuring 1800 videos, annotated by 90 human subjects. Using videos sourced from the YouTube-UGC and LSVQ Databases, this new resource is the largest publicly-available subjective video portrait region cropping database. We also introduce a post-processed version of the database, called LIVE-YT VC++, whereby a novel intra-frame temporal filter was deployed to smooth subjective annotations within each video. We demonstrate the usefulness of this new data resource using the SmartVidCrop algorithm and state-of-the-art video grounding models, in hopes of establishing our subjective dataset as a benchmark for future research. Our contributions offer a resource for advancing video aspect ratio transformation models towards ensuring that reshaped mobile-friendly video content retains its quality and meaning. Since our labels bear resemblances to video saliency annotations, we also conducted an additional analysis to explore the similarity between our labels and video saliency predictions. Finally, we repurposed state-of-the-art video grounding models for aspect ratio change tasks, and fine-tuned them on our dataset. As a service to the research community, we plan to open source the project.

AI.tldr: 论文创建了一个名为LIVE-YT VC的大规模视频裁剪数据库，用于解决移动设备上视频宽高比转换的挑战，并验证了其在视频裁剪算法中的实用性。
AI.motivation: 随着移动设备视频消费的快速增长，不同分辨率和显示方向的视频需要调整宽高比。传统的静态裁剪和填充方法会损害视觉质量，而变形可能扭曲视频的原始含义，因此需要更有效的视频裁剪解决方案。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含1800个视频、由90名人工标注的LIVE-YT VC数据库，并开发了LIVE-YT VC++版本，通过帧内时间滤波器平滑主观标注。同时，利用SmartVidCrop算法和最先进的视频定位模型验证数据库的实用性。
AI.result: 创建了目前最大的公开主观视频肖像区域裁剪数据库，展示了其在视频宽高比转换任务中的基准作用，并通过实验证明了标注与视频显著性预测的相似性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据库为推进视频宽高比变换模型提供了重要资源，有助于确保重塑后的移动友好视频内容保持质量和含义。项目计划开源以服务研究社区。

title: Why Does Reinforcement Learning Generalize? A Feature-Level Mechanistic Study of Post-Training in Large Language Models
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL)-based post-training often improves the reasoning performance of large language models (LLMs) beyond the training domain, while supervised fine-tuning (SFT) frequently leads to general capabilities forgetting. However, the mechanisms underlying this contrast remain unclear. To bridge this gap, we present a feature-level mechanistic analysis methodology to probe RL generalization using a controlled experimental setup, where RL- and SFT-tuned models are trained from the same base model on identical data. Leveraging our interpretability framework, we align internal activations across models within a shared feature space and analyze how features evolve during post-training. We find that SFT rapidly introduces many highly specialized features that stabilize early in training, whereas RL induces more restrained and continually evolving feature changes that largely preserve base models' representations. Focusing on samples where RL succeeds but the base model fails, we identify a compact, task-agnostic set of features that directly mediate generalization across diverse tasks. Feature-level interventions confirm their causal role: disabling these features significantly degrades RL models' generalization performance, while amplifying them improves base models' performance. The code is available at https://github.com/danshi777/RL-generalization.

AI.tldr: 通过对齐不同训练模型在共享特征空间中的内部激活，研究发现RL引入的特征变化更保守且持续演化，能保持基础模型表示；SFT则快速产生高度专门化的稳定特征。RL成功泛化依赖于识别出的紧凑、任务无关特征集。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于强化学习的后训练能提升大语言模型在训练域外的推理性能，而监督微调常导致泛化能力遗忘，但这种差异的潜在机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 提出特征级机制分析方法，通过控制实验（RL和SFT从相同基础模型在相同数据上训练），使用可解释框架在共享特征空间中对齐不同模型的内部激活，分析后训练过程中特征的演化。
AI.result: 发现SFT快速引入高度专门化特征并早期稳定，RL诱导更保守和持续演化的特征变化；在RL成功但基础模型失败的样本中识别出紧凑、任务无关的特征集；特征干预验证了其因果作用。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了RL和SFT在特征演化上的根本差异，证明了识别出的特征集在RL泛化中的关键作用，为理解LLM泛化机制提供了新视角。

title: Learning from Noisy Preferences: A Semi-Supervised Learning Approach to Direct Preference Optimization
summary: Human visual preferences are inherently multi-dimensional, encompassing aesthetics, detail fidelity, and semantic alignment. However, existing datasets provide only single, holistic annotations, resulting in severe label noise: images that excel in some dimensions but are deficient in others are simply marked as winner or loser. We theoretically demonstrate that compressing multi-dimensional preferences into binary labels generates conflicting gradient signals that misguide Diffusion Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). To address this, we propose Semi-DPO, a semi-supervised approach that treats consistent pairs as clean labeled data and conflicting ones as noisy unlabeled data. Our method starts by training on a consensus-filtered clean subset, then uses this model as an implicit classifier to generate pseudo-labels for the noisy set for iterative refinement. Experimental results demonstrate that Semi-DPO achieves state-of-the-art performance and significantly improves alignment with complex human preferences, without requiring additional human annotation or explicit reward models during training. We will release our code and models at: https://github.com/L-CodingSpace/semi-dpo

AI.tldr: 论文提出Semi-DPO方法，通过区分一致和冲突的偏好对来处理多维度人类视觉偏好的标签噪声问题，在无需额外标注的情况下实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集仅提供单一的、整体性的标注，导致在美学、细节保真度和语义对齐等多维度上表现不同的图像被简单地标记为胜者或败者，这种标签压缩会产生冲突的梯度信号，误导扩散模型的直接偏好优化(DPO)。
AI.method: Semi-DPO采用半监督学习方法，将一致性偏好对视为干净标签数据，冲突对视为噪声未标记数据。首先在共识过滤的干净子集上训练模型，然后将该模型作为隐式分类器为噪声集生成伪标签进行迭代优化。
AI.result: 实验结果表明Semi-DPO达到了最先进的性能，显著改善了与复杂人类偏好的一致性，且在训练过程中不需要额外的人工标注或显式奖励模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效处理多维度偏好压缩导致的标签噪声问题，Semi-DPO为扩散模型的偏好优化提供了一个高效且实用的解决方案，推动了人类视觉偏好对齐技术的发展。

title: Faithful Autoformalization via Roundtrip Verification and Repair
summary: When an LLM formalizes natural language, how do we know the output is faithful? We propose a roundtrip verification approach which does not require ground-truth annotations: formalize a statement, translate the result back to natural language, re-formalize, and use a formal tool to check logical equivalence. When the two formalizations agree, this provides evidence of a faithful formalization. When they disagree, a diagnosis step identifies which translation stage failed, and a targeted repair operator attempts to correct that stage. We evaluate our approach on 150 traffic rules using Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.2. Diagnosis-guided repair raises formal equivalence from 45--61% to 83--85% for both models, outperforming a random-repair baseline. An independent NLI analysis confirms that formal equivalence is correlated with less semantic drift.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需真实标注的往返验证方法，通过将语句形式化→自然语言→重新形式化→逻辑等价性检查的循环，来验证LLM形式化输出的忠实性，并通过诊断引导的修复将形式化等价率从45-61%提升至83-85%。
AI.motivation: 当大语言模型将自然语言形式化时，如何判断其输出是否忠实反映原文含义是一个重要但缺乏解决方案的问题。
AI.method: 设计往返验证流程：先用LLM将自然语言形式化，然后将结果翻译回自然语言，再次形式化，最后用形式化工具检查两个形式化版本的逻辑等价性。当结果不一致时，通过诊断识别失败的翻译阶段并使用针对性修复算子进行纠正。
AI.result: 在150个交通规则数据集上的评估表明，诊断引导的修复方法将Claude Opus 4.6和GPT-5.2的形式化等价率分别从45-61%提升至83-85%，显著优于随机修复基线。独立的NLI分析证实形式化等价性与语义漂移程度呈负相关。
AI.conclusion: 往返验证结合诊断引导修复是一种有效且实用的LLM形式化质量评估方法，能够在无需人工标注的情况下显著提高形式化输出的忠实性。

title: ViPO: Visual Preference Optimization at Scale
summary: While preference optimization is crucial for improving visual generative models, how to effectively scale this paradigm remains largely unexplored. Current open-source preference datasets contain conflicting preference patterns, where winners excel in some dimensions but underperform in others. Naively optimizing on such noisy datasets fails to learn preferences, hindering effective scaling. To enhance robustness against noise, we propose Poly-DPO, which extends the DPO objective with an additional polynomial term that dynamically adjusts model confidence based on dataset characteristics, enabling effective learning across diverse data distributions. Beyond biased patterns, existing datasets suffer from low resolution, limited prompt diversity, and imbalanced distributions. To facilitate large-scale visual preference optimization by tackling data bottlenecks, we construct ViPO, a massive-scale preference dataset with 1M image pairs at 1024px across five categories and 300K video pairs at 720p+ across three categories. State-of-the-art generative models and diverse prompts ensure reliable preference signals with balanced distributions. Remarkably, when applying Poly-DPO to our high-quality dataset, the optimal configuration converges to standard DPO. This convergence validates dataset quality and Poly-DPO's adaptive nature: sophisticated optimization becomes unnecessary with sufficient data quality, yet remains valuable for imperfect datasets. We validate our approach across visual generation models. On noisy datasets like Pick-a-Pic V2, Poly-DPO achieves 6.87 and 2.32 gains over Diffusion-DPO on GenEval for SD1.5 and SDXL, respectively. For ViPO, models achieve performance far exceeding those trained on existing open-source preference datasets. These results confirm that addressing both algorithmic adaptability and data quality is essential for scaling visual preference optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Poly-DPO算法和ViPO大规模视觉偏好数据集，解决了视觉生成模型偏好优化中的噪声适应性和数据质量问题。
AI.motivation: 现有开源视觉偏好数据集存在冲突模式、低分辨率、提示多样性不足等缺陷，限制了偏好优化范式的有效扩展。
AI.method: 1) 提出Poly-DPO：在DPO目标函数中加入多项式项，动态调整模型置信度以增强噪声鲁棒性；2) 构建ViPO数据集：包含1百万个1024px图像对和30万个720p+视频对，覆盖5类图像和3类视频。
AI.result: 在Pick-a-Pic V2噪声数据集上，Poly-DPO相比Diffusion-DPO在GenEval上分别取得6.87和2.32的性能提升（SD1.5和SDXL）；使用ViPO数据集训练的模型性能远超现有数据集。
AI.conclusion: 视觉偏好优化的规模化需要同时解决算法 adaptiveness 和数据质量问题；高质量数据使Poly-DPO收敛为标准DPO，证明了算法的自适应性和数据集的品质。

title: Dual-Track CoT: Budget-Aware Stepwise Guidance for Small LMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) solve many reasoning tasks via chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting, but smaller models (about 7 to 8B parameters) still struggle with multi-step reasoning under tight compute and token budgets. Existing test time reasoning methods such as self consistency (sampling multiple rationales and voting), Tree-of-Thoughts (search over intermediate thoughts), and critique revise loops improve performance, but often at high token cost and without fine-grained step-level control. This project1 aims to address that gap: can Small Language Models (SLMs) reason reliably using the same or fewer tokens? This question is both scientific and practical. Scientifically, it probes whether process supervision and simple test-time controls (such as token budgets and rejection of redundant steps) can substitute for model scale or large sampling counts. Practically, many deployments (on-device, low-latency, or cost-constrained settings) cannot afford huge models or dozens of sampled rationales per query. A method that improves SLM reasoning at fixed cost would therefore be directly useful.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索小型语言模型(SLMs)如何在有限计算资源下实现可靠推理，旨在开发一种与CoT相比使用相同或更少token的推理方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型通过思维链提示解决推理任务，但7-8B参数的小型模型受限于计算和token预算，在多步推理上表现不佳。现有的测试时推理方法(如自一致性、思维树等)虽然提高性能但token成本过高，缺乏细粒度的步骤级控制。
AI.method: 拟通过过程监督和简单的测试时控制机制(如token预算分配、冗余步骤拒绝)来替代模型规模或大量采样，从而提升小型语言模型的推理能力。
AI.result: 该项目尚未展示具体结果，但目标是在固定成本下提升SLM推理性能，使其在边缘设备、低延迟或成本受限场景下能够实际部署。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究具有科学和实践双重意义：科学上探索过程监督能否替代模型规模；实践上为资源受限环境提供可行的推理解决方案，满足成本敏感部署需求。

title: A New Kind of Network? Review and Reference Implementation of Neural Cellular Automata
summary: Stephen Wolfram proclaimed in his 2003 seminal work "A New Kind Of Science" that simple recursive programs in the form of Cellular Automata (CA) are a promising approach to replace currently used mathematical formalizations, e.g. differential equations, to improve the modeling of complex systems. Over two decades later, while Cellular Automata have still been waiting for a substantial breakthrough in scientific applications, recent research showed new and promising approaches which combine Wolfram's ideas with learnable Artificial Neural Networks: So-called Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) are able to learn the complex update rules of CA from data samples, allowing them to model complex, self-organizing generative systems. The aim of this paper is to review the existing work on NCA and provide a unified modular framework and notation, as well as a reference implementation in the open-source library NCAtorch.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了神经细胞自动机(NCA)的研究进展，提出了统一的模块化框架和表示法，并开发了开源库NCAtorch作为参考实现。
AI.motivation: Stephen Wolfram在2003年提出细胞自动机可作为复杂系统建模的新方法，但传统CA需要人工设计更新规则。近年来将CA与神经网络结合的NCA能够从数据中学习复杂规则，为建模复杂自组织生成系统提供了新可能。
AI.method: 对现有NCA工作进行系统综述，建立统一的模块化框架和标准化表示法，并开发了名为NCAtorch的开源参考实现库。
AI.result: 提供了NCA领域的综合性综述，建立了标准化的理论框架，开发并发布了NCAtorch开源库，为研究人员提供统一的工具和参考。
AI.conclusion: NCA代表了一种将传统细胞自动机与现代深度学习相结合的有前途方法，本工作通过提供统一框架和开源实现，有助于推动该领域的进一步发展和应用。

title: Analyzing LLM Reasoning to Uncover Mental Health Stigma
summary: While large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being explored for mental health applications, recent studies reveal that they can exhibit stigma toward individuals with psychological conditions. Existing evaluations of this stigma primarily rely on multiple-choice questions (MCQs), which fail to capture the biases embedded within the models' underlying logic. In this paper, we analyze the intermediate reasoning steps of LLMs to uncover hidden stigmatizing language and the internal rationales driving it. We leverage clinical expertise to categorize common patterns of stigmatizing language directed at individuals with psychological conditions and use this framework to identify and tag problematic statements in LLM reasoning. Furthermore, we rate the severity of these statements, distinguishing between overt prejudice and more subtle, less immediately harmful biases. To broaden the reasoning domain and capture a wider array of patterns, we also extend an existing mental health stigma benchmark by incorporating additional psychological conditions. Our findings demonstrate that evaluating model reasoning not only exposes substantially more stigma than traditional MCQ-based methods but it helps to identify the flaws in the LLMs' logic and their understanding of mental health conditions.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析大语言模型的推理步骤，发现传统多选题评估方法无法揭示的隐藏污名化语言和内在逻辑缺陷，并建立了更全面的评估框架来识别和量化心理健康领域的偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在心理健康应用中的污名化评估主要依赖多选题，这种方法无法捕捉模型底层逻辑中嵌入的偏见，而污名化语言可能对患者造成伤害。
AI.method: 结合临床专业知识，建立污名化语言分类框架；分析LLM的中间推理步骤，识别并标记问题陈述；对污名化陈述进行严重程度评级；扩展现有基准测试以涵盖更多心理疾病类型。
AI.result: 基于推理的分析方法比传统多选题方法发现了更多的污名化表达，并成功识别出LLM在逻辑理解和心理健康知识方面的具体缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 评估模型推理过程不仅能够更全面地发现偏见，还能帮助定位LLM在心理健康知识理解上的不足，为改进模型提供了重要指导。

title: DouC: Dual-Branch CLIP for Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation requires assigning pixel-level semantic labels while supporting an open and unrestricted set of categories. Training-free CLIP-based approaches preserve strong zero-shot generalization but typically rely on a single inference mechanism, limiting their ability to jointly address unreliable local tokens and insufficient spatial coherence. We propose DouC, a training-free dual-branch CLIP framework that decomposes dense prediction into two complementary components. OG-CLIP improves patch-level reliability via lightweight, inference-time token gating, while FADE-CLIP injects external structural priors through proxy attention guided by frozen vision foundation models. The two branches are fused at the logit level, enabling local token reliability and structure-aware patch interactions to jointly influence final predictions, with optional instance-aware correction applied as post-processing. DouC introduces no additional learnable parameters, requires no retraining, and preserves CLIP's zero-shot generalization. Extensive experiments across eight benchmarks and multiple CLIP backbones demonstrate that DouC consistently outperforms prior training-free methods and scales favorably with model capacity.

AI.tldr: DouC是一个免训练的双分支CLIP框架，通过OG-CLIP和FADE-CLIP两个互补分支分别解决局部标记不可靠和空间一致性不足的问题，在开放词汇语义分割任务中取得了优异性能。
AI.motivation: 基于CLIP的免训练方法虽然保持了强大的零泛化能力，但仅依赖单一推理机制，难以同时解决局部标记不可靠和空间一致性不足的问题，限制了其在开放词汇语义分割中的性能。
AI.method: 提出DouC双分支框架：OG-CLIP通过轻量级推理时标记门控提高patch级可靠性；FADE-CLIP通过冻结视觉基础模型引导的代理注意力注入外部结构先验；两个分支在logit层融合，可选实例感知校正作为后处理。整个框架无需可学习参数，无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在8个基准测试和多个CLIP主干网络上，DouC一致性地优于先前的免训练方法，且随着模型容量扩展保持良好的扩展性能。
AI.conclusion: DouC成功将密集预测分解为两个互补组件，在不牺牲CLIP零样本泛化能力的前提下，通过联合优化局部标记可靠性和结构感知patch交互，有效提升了开放词汇语义分割性能。

title: The Dynamics of Delusion: Modeling Bidirectional False Belief Amplification in Human-Chatbot Dialogue
summary: There is growing concern that AI chatbots might fuel delusional beliefs in users. Some have suggested that humans and chatbots mutually reinforce false beliefs over time, but quantitative evidence is lacking. Using a unique dataset of chat logs from individuals who exhibited delusional thinking, we developed a latent state model that captures accumulating and decaying influences between humans and chatbots. We find that a bidirectional influence model substantially outperforms a unidirectional alternative where humans are the primary driver of delusion. We find that humans exert strong but short-lived influence on chatbots, whereas chatbots exert longer-lasting influence on humans. Moreover, chatbots exert strong, stable self-influence over their own future outputs that tends to perpetuate delusions over long stretches of conversation. In fact, this chatbot self-influence constituted the dominant pathway when considering accumulated influence over time. Overall, these results indicate that humans tend to drive sharp, immediate increases in delusion, whereas chatbots sustain and propagate these effects over longer timescales. Together, these findings provide the first quantitative evidence that human-chatbot interactions can form feedback loops of delusion, decomposable into distinct pathways with dissociable temporal dynamics. By doing so, they can inform the development of safer AI systems.

AI.tldr: 研究通过分析妄想思维用户的聊天记录，发现人类与AI聊天机器人之间存在双向的妄想反馈循环，其中人类引发短期的妄想增强，而聊天机器人则长期维持和传播妄想。
AI.motivation: 随着AI聊天机器人的普及，人们担心它们可能会加剧用户的妄想信念。虽然有人提出人类和聊天机器人可能相互强化虚假信念，但缺乏定量证据来支持这一假设。
AI.method: 研究团队使用表现出妄想思维的个体的聊天日志数据集，开发了一个潜在状态模型，该模型能够捕捉人类与聊天机器人之间的累积和衰减影响。他们比较了双向影响模型（人类与聊天bot相互影响）和单向模型（人类是妄想的主要驱动因素）。
AI.result: 研究发现双向影响模型显著优于单向模型。人类对聊天机器人产生强烈但短暂的影响，而聊天机器人对人类产生更持久的影响。更重要的是，聊天机器人对其自身未来输出产生强大且稳定的自我影响，这倾向于在长时间对话中持续传播妄想。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果表明人类倾向于引发妄想的急性和即时增加，而聊天机器人在更长时间尺度上维持和传播这些效应。研究首次定量证明了人机对话可以形成可分解为不同时间动态路径的妄想反馈循环，为开发更安全的AI系统提供了重要参考。

title: BifDet: A 3D Bifurcation Detection Dataset for Airway-Tree Modeling
comment: This manuscript is currently in preparation for submission
summary: Thoracic Computed Tomography (CT) scans offer detailed insights into the intricate branching network of the airway tree, which is essential for understanding various respiratory diseases. Airway bifurcations, where airway branches split, are crucial landmarks for understanding lung physiology, disease mechanisms and lesion localization. Despite the significance of bifurcation analysis, a notable lack of datasets annotated for this task hinders the development of advanced automated specialized detection or segmentation tools. In this paper, we introduce BifDet, the first publicly-available dataset specialized for 3D airway bifurcation detection, filling a critical gap in existing resources. Our dataset comprises carefully annotated CT scans from the ATM22 open-access cohort with bifurcation bounding boxes covering the parent and daughter branches. As a use-case for demonstrating the potential of BifDet, we fine-tune and evaluate RetinaNet and DETR for 3D airway bifurcations detection on CT scans. We provide detailed pipelines, including preprocessing steps and specific implementation design choices. Results are detailed over various categories of minimal bounding box sizes to serve as baseline to benchmark future research.

AI.tldr: BifDet 是首个用于3D气道分叉检测的公开数据集，包含精心标注的CT扫描数据，并通过RetinaNet和DETR模型验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 气道分叉在理解肺部生理、疾病机制和病灶定位中至关重要，但缺乏专门的数据集阻碍了自动化检测工具的发展。
AI.method: 构建了BifDet数据集，标注了ATM22队列中的CT扫描数据中的气道分叉边界框；使用RetinaNet和DETR进行3D检测任务的微调和评估，并提供了详细的预处理流程和实现细节。
AI.result: 成功创建了首个公开的3D气道分叉检测数据集，RetinaNet和DETR模型在该数据集上表现出良好的检测性能，为未来研究提供了基准。
AI.conclusion: BifDet填补了气道分叉检测数据集的空白，为开发先进的自动化气道分析工具奠定基础，将促进呼吸疾病研究和临床应用的发展。

title: Diagnosis, Bad Planning & Reasoning. Treatment, SCOPE -- Planning for Hybrid Querying over Clinical Trial Data
summary: We study clinical trial table reasoning, where answers are not directly stored in visible cells but must be reasoned from semantic understanding through normalization, classification, extraction, or lightweight domain reasoning. Motivated by the observation that current LLM approaches often suffer from "bad reasoning" under implicit planning assumptions, we focus on settings in which the model must recover implicit attributes such as therapy type, added agents, endpoint roles, or follow-up status from partially observed clinical-trial tables. We propose SCOPE (Structured Clinical hybrid Planning for Evidence retrieval in clinical trials), a multi-LLM planner-based framework that decomposes the task into row selection, structured planning, and execution. The planner makes the source field, reasoning rules, and output constraints explicit before answer generation, reducing ambiguity relative to direct prompting. We evaluate SCOPE on 1,500 hybrid reasoning questions over oncology clinical-trial tables against zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, TableGPT2, Blend-SQL, and EHRAgent. Results show that explicit multi-LLM planning improves accuracy for reasoning-based questions while offering a stronger accuracy-efficiency tradeoff than heavier agentic baselines. Our findings position clinical trial reasoning as a distinct table understanding problem and highlight hybrid planner-based decomposition as an effective solution

AI.tldr: 本研究针对临床试验表格推理问题，提出了SCOPE框架，通过多LLM规划器将任务分解为行选择、结构化规划和执行三个步骤，显著提升了需要隐式推理的问题的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在临床试验表格推理中经常出现'推理偏差'问题，因为模型需要从部分观察的临床试验表格中恢复隐式属性（如治疗类型、添加剂、终点角色或随访状态），而这些推理过程在直接提示中缺乏明确性。
AI.method: 提出SCOPE框架，采用多LLM规划器将任务分解为：1）行选择；2）结构化规划；3）执行。规划器在答案生成前明确源字段、推理规则和输出约束，相比直接提示法减少了模糊性。
AI.result: 在1,500个肿瘤临床试验表格的混合推理问题评估中，SCOPE相比零样本、少样本、思维链、TableGPT2、Blend-SQL和EHRAgent等方法，显式多LLM规划显著提升了基于推理问题的准确性，同时相比重型智能基线提供了更好的准确性-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 研究将临床试验推理定位为独特的表格理解问题，强调基于混合规划器的分解是解决此类问题的有效方案，为理解复杂临床数据表格提供了新的研究方向。

title: ShapeY: A Principled Framework for Measuring Shape Recognition Capacity via Nearest-Neighbor Matching
summary: Object recognition (OR) in humans relies heavily on shape cues and the ability to recognize objects across varying 3D viewpoints. Unlike humans, deep networks often rely on non-shape cues such as texture and background, leading to vulnerabilities in generalization and robustness. To address this gap, we introduce ShapeY, a novel and principled benchmarking framework designed to evaluate shape-based recognition capability in OR systems. ShapeY comprises 68,200 grayscale images of 200 3D objects rendered from multiple viewpoints and optionally subjected to non-shape ``appearance'' changes. Using a nearest-neighbor matching task, ShapeY specifically probes the fine-grained structure of an OR system's embedding space by evaluating whether object views are clustered by 3D shape similarity across varying 3D viewpoints and other non-shape changes. ShapeY provides a suite of quantitative and qualitative performance readouts, including error rate graphs, viewpoint tuning curves, histograms of positive and negative matching scores, and grids showing ordered best matches, which together offer a comprehensive evaluation of an OR system's shape understanding capability. Testing of 321 pre-trained networks with diverse architectures reveals significant challenges in achieving robust shape-based recognition: even state-of-the-art models struggle to generalize consistently across 3D viewpoint and appearance changes, and are prone to infrequent but egregious matches of objects of obviously completely different shape. ShapeY establishes a principled framework for advancing artificial vision systems toward human-like shape recognition capabilities, emphasizing the importance of disentangled and invariant object encodings.

AI.tldr: ShapeY是一个专门评估物体识别系统形状识别能力的新基准框架，通过68,200个灰度图像测试多种3D视角下的形状泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 人类物体识别主要依赖形状线索，但深度网络常依赖纹理等非形状 cues，导致泛化和鲁棒性问题，需要专门的形状识别评估工具。
AI.method: 构建包含200个3D物体多视角渲染的68,200个灰度图像数据集，使用最近邻匹配任务评估嵌入空间结构，提供多种定量和定性性能指标。
AI.result: 测试321个预训练网络显示，即使最先进模型在3D视角和外观变化下的形状泛化能力仍存在严重问题，会出现明显不同形状的错误匹配。
AI.conclusion: ShapeY为推进人工视觉系统向人类级形状识别发展建立了原则性框架，强调了分离且不变的对象编码的重要性。

title: LongSumEval: Question-Answering Based Evaluation and Feedback-Driven Refinement for Long Document Summarization
summary: Evaluating long document summaries remains the primary bottleneck in summarization research. Existing metrics correlate weakly with human judgments and produce aggregate scores without explaining deficiencies or guiding improvement, preventing effective refinement in applications requiring verifiable accuracy. We introduce LongSumEval, a unified framework bridging evaluation and generation through structured question-answering feedback. The framework operationalizes summary quality as answerability and factual alignment of question-answer pairs, generating interpretable scores and actionable feedback that identifies coverage gaps and factual inconsistencies. This resolves the misalignment where evaluation operates independently of generation objectives. Meta-evaluation of our QA-based evaluation module across seven benchmarks demonstrates substantially stronger agreement with human judgments compared to established metrics. Structured feedback enables significant quality improvements through self-refinement without retraining. By demonstrating that evaluation feedback can serve as executable instructions for generation, this work establishes a generalizable paradigm for aligning assessment with improvement, with direct implications for controllable text generation requiring verifiable accuracy and transparent quality control. All code and datasets will be released in GitHub for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: LongSumEval是一个基于结构化问答反馈的统一框架，它通过将摘要质量转化为问答对的可回答性和事实一致性，实现了长文档摘要的有效评估和自我改进。
AI.motivation: 现有摘要评估指标与人类判断相关性弱，仅提供聚合分数而无法解释缺陷或指导改进，这在需要可验证准确性的应用中阻碍了有效优化。
AI.method: 提出LongSumEval框架，将摘要质量操作化为问答对的可回答性和事实一致性，生成可解释的分数和可操作的反馈，识别覆盖面缺口和事实不一致，解决评估与生成目标独立运行的错位问题。
AI.result: 在七个基准测试上的元评估显示，QA评估模块与人类判断的一致性显著优于已有指标；结构化反馈通过自我改进实现了显著的质量提升，无需重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明评估反馈可作为生成的可执行指令，建立了评估与改进对齐的可推广范式，对需要可验证准确性和透明质量控制的可控文本生成具有重要意义。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Benchmarking Cross-Task Consistency in Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (uMMs) aim to support both visual understanding and visual generation within a shared representation. However, existing evaluation protocols assess these two capabilities independently and do not examine whether they are semantically aligned. As a result, it remains unclear whether current uMMs learn coherent unified representations that remain consistent across tasks given a visual concept. We introduce XTC-Bench, a scene-graph-grounded evaluation framework that measures cross-task visual semantic consistency. By deriving both generation prompts and understanding queries from a structured scene graph, our framework enables fact-level alignment analysis across objects, attributes, and relations. We propose Continuous Cross-Task Agreement (CCTA), a fine-grained metric that quantifies semantic agreement between generation and understanding over matched atomic facts, isolating internal consistency from standalone task accuracy. Extensive experiments on eight open-source and one commercial unified models reveal that high generation or understanding performance does not imply strong cross-task alignment, and architectural analysis shows consistency is governed by how tightly learning objectives are coupled across modalities, not by architectural unification alone. XTC-Bench provides a reproducible and model-agnostic framework for diagnosing representation-level misalignment, offering a concrete direction for advancing unified multimodal modeling beyond isolated task performance.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了XTC-Bench评估框架，通过场景图衍生任务来度量统一多模态模型的跨任务视觉语义一致性，发现强大的单任务表现不意味着跨任务对齐，架构统一本身不足以保证一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型(uMMs)评估协议独立测试视觉理解和生成能力，缺乏对两者语义对齐的检验，无法判断模型是否学习到了在任务间保持一致的统一表示。
AI.method: 提出基于场景图的XTC-Bench框架，从结构化场景图生成提示和查询，实现对象、属性和关系的事实级对齐分析；设计CCTA指标量化生成与理解在匹配原子事实上的语义一致性。
AI.result: 对8个开源和1个商业统一模型的实验表明，高生成或理解性能不保证强跨任务对齐，架构分析发现一致性由跨模态学习目标的耦合程度决定，而非架构统一本身。
AI.conclusion: XTC-Bench提供了可重现、模型无关的框架来诊断表示级不对齐，为推进超越孤立任务性能的统一多模态建模提供了明确方向。

title: What Makes Good Instruction-Tuning Data? An In-Context Learning Perspective
summary: Instruction-tuning datasets often contain substantial redundancy and low-quality samples, necessitating effective data selection methods. We propose an instruction data selection framework based on weighted in-context influence (wICI), which measures how effectively each candidate example reduces instruction-following difficulty for semantically related peers. Through systematic experiments, we address three key questions: what constitutes effective instruction tuning data from an in-context perspective, whether sample difficulty correlates with in-context influence, and how in-context influence translates to instruction tuning effectiveness. Experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing baselines under constrained data budgets, while empirically showing that sample difficulty negatively correlates with in-context influence.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于加权上下文影响(wICI)的指令数据选择框架，用于筛选高质量指令微调数据，在有限数据预算下显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 指令微调数据集常存在大量冗余和低质量样本，需要有效的数据选择方法来提高训练效率和模型性能。
AI.method: 提出wICI框架，通过测量每个候选样本对语义相关同伴指令跟随难度的减少程度来评估样本质量，系统性地从上下文学习角度选择有效数据。
AI.result: 在多个模型和基准测试中，该方法在受限数据预算下持续优于现有基线，并实证发现样本难度与上下文影响呈负相关关系。
AI.conclusion: 加权上下文影响为指令数据选择提供了新的视角，证明了样本对同伴学习的贡献程度是评估数据有效性的重要指标，为高效指令微调提供了实用解决方案。

title: One Perturbation, Two Failure Modes: Probing VLM Safety via Embedding-Guided Typographic Perturbations
summary: Typographic prompt injection exploits vision language models' (VLMs) ability to read text rendered in images, posing a growing threat as VLMs power autonomous agents. Prior work typically focus on maximizing attack success rate (ASR) but does not explain \emph{why} certain renderings bypass safety alignment. We make two contributions. First, an empirical study across four VLMs including GPT-4o and Claude, twelve font sizes, and ten transformations reveals that multimodal embedding distance strongly predicts ASR ($r{=}{-}0.71$ to ${-}0.93$, $p{<}0.01$), providing an interpretable, model agnostic proxy. Since embedding distance predicts ASR, reducing it should improve attack success, but the relationship is mediated by two factors: perceptual readability (whether the VLM can parse the text) and safety alignment (whether it refuses to comply). Second, we use this as a red teaming tool: we directly maximize image text embedding similarity under bounded $\ell_\infty$ perturbations via CWA-SSA across four surrogate embedding models, stress testing both factors without access to the target model. Experiments across five degradation settings on GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Mistral-Large-3, and Qwen3-VL confirm that optimization recovers readability and reduces safety aligned refusals as two co-occurring effects, with the dominant mechanism depending on the model's safety filter strength and the degree of visual degradation.

AI.tldr: 本研究发现多模态嵌入距离可以预测Typography提示注入攻击的成功率，并利用这一特性开发了无需目标模型访问权限的对抗性攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型（VLMs）日益广泛地应用于自主代理系统，利用图像中渲染文字的Typography提示注入攻击构成日益严重的威胁。现有研究主要关注最大化攻击成功率，但未能解释为何某些特定渲染方式能够绕过安全对齐。
AI.method: 首先对四个VLMs（包括GPT-4o和Claude）进行实证研究，发现多模态嵌入距离与攻击成功率强相关（r=-0.71到-0.93）。然后基于此发现，开发CWA-SSA方法在有界ℓ∞扰动下直接最大化图像文本嵌入相似度，作为红队测试工具。
AI.result: 实验在五个降级设置下验证了该方法在GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4.5、Mistral-Large-3和Qwen3-VL上的有效性。优化能够同时恢复可读性和减少安全对齐拒绝，主导机制取决于模型安全过滤器强度和视觉降级程度。
AI.conclusion: 多模态嵌入距离是预测Typography攻击效果的有效代理指标，基于此原理的攻击方法能够在不访问目标模型的情况下有效绕过安全防护，为VLM安全研究提供了重要工具和见解。

title: Korean aegyo speech shows systematic F1 increase to signal childlike qualities
summary: Korean aegyo is a socially recognized childlike speaking style used predominantly in romantic interactions among adults. This study examined vowel space modification in aegyo by analyzing formant frequencies from twelve Seoul Korean speakers who produced identical scripts in aegyo and non-aegyo styles. Results show that aegyo speech features a significant increase in F1 values across vowels and selective fronting of front vowels, leading to vowel space expansion but mainly a shift to higher F1. These findings suggest that adult speakers stylize childlike speech by imitating the shorter vocal tract of children, mainly through global vowel lowering and partial fronting.

AI.tldr: 韩语'可爱说'是一种成人间浪漫交流中使用的幼稚说话风格，其声学特征主要表现为元音空间中F1值普遍升高和前元音的前移。
AI.motivation: 韩语'可爱说'是成人浪漫交往中广泛认可的幼稚说话方式，但对其声学特征的科学分析尚未充分展开，需要量化研究其语音变异机制。
AI.method: 对12名首尔韩语说话者分别用'可爱说'和普通风格朗读相同文本，通过分析元音共振峰频率来比较两种说话风格的元音空间变化。
AI.result: '可爱说'说话风格下所有元音的F1值显著增加，前元音出现选择性前移，导致元音空间扩张但主要体现为F1值升高。
AI.conclusion: 成人说话者主要通过全局元音降低和部分前移的方式模拟儿童的短声道特征，从而实现幼稚说话风格的语音化表达。

title: M$^3$-VQA: A Benchmark for Multimodal, Multi-Entity, Multi-Hop Visual Question Answering
summary: We present M$^3$-VQA, a novel knowledge-based Visual Question Answering (VQA) benchmark, to enhance the evaluation of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in fine-grained multimodal entity understanding and complex multi-hop reasoning. Unlike existing VQA datasets that focus on coarse-grained categories and simple reasoning over single entities, M$^3$-VQA introduces diverse multi-entity questions involving multiple distinct entities from both visual and textual sources. It requires models to perform both sequential and parallel multi-hop reasoning across multiple documents, supported by traceable, detailed evidence and a curated multimodal knowledge base. We evaluate 16 leading MLLMs under three settings: without external knowledge, with gold evidence, and with retrieval-augmented input. The poor results reveal significant challenges for MLLMs in knowledge acquisition and reasoning. Models perform poorly without external information but improve markedly when provided with precise evidence. Furthermore, reasoning-aware agentic retrieval surpasses heuristic methods, highlighting the importance of structured reasoning for complex multimodal understanding. M$^3$-VQA presents a more challenging evaluation for advancing the multimodal reasoning capabilities of MLLMs. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/M3VQA.

AI.tldr: M³-VQA是一个新的基于知识的视觉问答评测基准，专注于评估多模态大语言模型在细粒度实体理解和复杂多跳推理方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的VQA数据集主要集中在粗粒度类别和单一实体的简单推理上，无法充分评估MLLMs的复杂多模态理解和推理能力。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含多样化多实体问题的数据集，要求模型对来自视觉和文本源的多个不同实体进行顺序和并行的多跳推理，并提供了可追踪的详细证据和精心策划的多模态知识库。
AI.result: 评估了16个主流MLLMs，结果显示模型在没有外部信息时表现很差，但在提供精确证据时显著提升；推理感知的检索方法优于启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: M³-VQA为推进MLLMs的多模态推理能力提供了更具挑战性的评测基准，突显了结构化推理对复杂多模态理解的重要性。

title: FAMA: Failure-Aware Meta-Agentic Framework for Open-Source LLMs in Interactive Tool Use Environments
summary: Large Language Models are being increasingly deployed as the decision-making core of autonomous agents capable of effecting change in external environments. Yet, in conversational benchmarks, which simulate real-world customer-centric issue resolution scenarios, these agents frequently fail due to the cascading effects of incorrect decision-making. These challenges are particularly pronounced for open-source LLMs with smaller parameter sizes, limited context windows, and constrained inference budgets, which contribute to increased error accumulation in agentic settings. To tackle these challenges, we present the Failure-Aware Meta-Agentic (FAMA) framework. FAMA operates in two stages: first, it analyzes failure trajectories from baseline agents to identify the most prevalent errors; second, it employs an orchestration mechanism that activates a minimal subset of specialized agents tailored to address these failures by injecting a targeted context for the tool-use agent before the decision-making step. Experiments across open-source LLMs demonstrate performance gains up to 27% across evaluation modes over standard baselines. These results highlight that targeted curation of context through specialized agents to address common failures is a valuable design principle for building reliable, multi-turn tool-use LLM agents that simulate real-world conversational scenarios.

AI.tldr: FAMA框架通过分析基线代理的失败轨迹，识别常见错误，并在决策前激活专门的代理来注入针对性的上下文，显著提升了小型开源LLM在对话代理中的性能。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在对话式基准测试中经常失败，特别是小型开源LLM由于参数限制、上下文窗口有限和推理预算受限，导致在代理环境中错误累积问题严重。
AI.method: FAMA框架采用两阶段方法：首先分析基线代理的失败轨迹识别最常见的错误类型；其次通过编排机制激活最小子集的专用代理，在决策步骤前为工具使用代理注入针对性上下文。
AI.result: 在多种开源LLM上的实验证明，FAMA相比标准基线在所有评估模式下实现了最高27%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调，通过专门的代理有针对性地策划上下文以解决常见故障，是构建可靠、多轮工具使用LLM代理的重要设计原则，特别适用于模拟真实对话场景。

title: ResetEdit: Precise Text-guided Editing of Generated Image via Resettable Starting Latent
summary: Recent advances in diffusion models have enabled high-quality image generation, leading to increasing demand for post-generation editing that modifies local regions while preserving global structure. Achieving such flexible and precise editing requires a high-quality starting point, a latent representation that provides both the freedom needed for diverse modifications and the precision required for fine-grained, region-specific control. However, existing inversion-based approaches such as DDIM inversion often yield unsatisfactory starting latents, resulting in degraded edit fidelity and structural inconsistency. Ideally, the most suitable editing anchor should be the original latent used during the generation process, as it inherently captures the scene's structure and semantics. Yet, storing this latent for every generated image is impractical due to massive storage and retrieval costs. To address this challenge, we propose ResetEdit, a proactive diffusion editing framework that embeds recoverable latent information directly into the generation process. By injecting the discrepancy between the clean and diffused latents into the diffusion trajectory and extracting it during inversion, ResetEdit reconstructs a resettable latent that closely approximates the true starting state. Additionally, a lightweight latent optimization module compensates for reconstruction bias caused by VAE asymmetry. Built upon Stable Diffusion, ResetEdit integrates seamlessly with existing tuning-free editing methods and consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both controllability and visual fidelity.

AI.tldr: ResetEdit是一种主动式扩散编辑框架，通过在生成过程中嵌入可恢复的隐向量信息，解决了扩散模型局部编辑时的编辑保真度和结构一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型图像生成需要高质量的后生成编辑，现有基于反演的方法得到的起始隐向量质量不佳，导致编辑效果差；而使用原始生成隐向量虽好但存储成本过高。
AI.method: ResetEdit通过将隐向量差异注入扩散轨迹并提取重建可重置隐向量，结合轻量级隐向量优化模块补偿VAE不对称性，构建了主动式编辑框架。
AI.result: 基于Stable Diffusion的ResetEdit在可控性和视觉保真度方面持续超越现有最先进基线方法，并与现有免调参编辑方法无缝集成。
AI.conclusion: ResetEdit成功解决了扩散模型局部编辑中的起始隐向量质量问题，实现了高精度、高保真的局部编辑，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Frictive Policy Optimization for LLMs: Epistemic Intervention, Risk-Sensitive Control, and Reflective Alignment
comment: Frictive Policy Optimization; epistemic alignment; risk-sensitive control; LLM alignment; clarification and refusal; preference learning; trust regions; dialogue agents
summary: We propose Frictive Policy Optimization (FPO), a framework for learning language model policies that regulate not only what to say, but when and how to intervene in order to manage epistemic and normative risk. Unlike standard alignment methods that optimize surface-level preference or task utility, FPO treats clarification, verification, challenge, redirection, and refusal as explicit control actions whose purpose is to shape the evolution of belief, commitment, and uncertainty over time. We formalize alignment as a risk-sensitive epistemic control problem in which intervention decisions are selected based on their expected effect on downstream epistemic quality rather than on immediate reward alone. We introduce a compact taxonomy of frictive interventions, a structured friction functional that operationalizes multiple alignment failure modes, and a unified family of FPO methods spanning reward shaping, preference pairing, group-relative ranking, and risk-conditioned trust regions. We further propose an evaluation framework that measures epistemic competence directly through clarification behavior, calibration, contradiction repair, refusal proportionality, and information efficiency. Together, these results provide a formal and algorithmic foundation for learning agents that are aligned not only in outcome, but in epistemic conduct.

AI.tldr: FPO是一个学习语言模型策略的新框架，通过明确的摩擦干预来管理认知和规范风险，实现更深层次的对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统对齐方法只关注表面偏好或任务效用，缺乏对语言模型在对话中如何管理认知和规范风险的考虑，需要一种能够控制认知行为的对齐方法。
AI.method: 提出摩擦策略优化框架，将澄清、验证、挑战等视为控制动作，构建风险敏感的认知控制问题，设计摩擦干预分类法和结构化摩擦函数，建立统一的FPO方法族，包括奖励塑形、偏好配对等多种技术。
AI.result: 提供了评估框架来直接衡量认知能力，通过澄清行为、校准、矛盾修复等多个指标评估，为学习具有认知行为对齐的智能体提供了形式化和算法基础。
AI.conclusion: FPO框架实现了从结果对齐向认知行为对齐的转变，为构建更安全、更可控的语言模型提供了新的理论基础和实践方法。

title: IAM: Identity-Aware Human Motion and Shape Joint Generation
summary: Recent advances in text-driven human motion generation enable models to synthesize realistic motion sequences from natural language descriptions. However, most existing approaches assume identity-neutral motion and generate movements using a canonical body representation, ignoring the strong influence of body morphology on motion dynamics. In practice, attributes such as body proportions, mass distribution, and age significantly affect how actions are performed, and neglecting this coupling often leads to physically inconsistent motions. We propose an identity-aware motion generation framework that explicitly models the relationship between body morphology and motion dynamics. Instead of relying on explicit geometric measurements, identity is represented using multimodal signals, including natural language descriptions and visual cues. We further introduce a joint motion-shape generation paradigm that simultaneously synthesizes motion sequences and body shape parameters, allowing identity cues to directly modulate motion dynamics. Extensive experiments on motion capture datasets and large-scale in-the-wild videos demonstrate improved motion realism and motion-identity consistency while maintaining high motion quality. Project page: https://vjwq.github.io/IAM

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种身份感知的人体运动生成框架，通过多模态信号表示身体形态特征，并采用联合运动-形状生成范式，解决了现有方法忽视身体形态对运动动力学影响的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本驱动人体运动生成方法假设身份中立运动，使用规范身体表示，忽略了身体形态（如身体比例、质量分布、年龄等）对运动动力学的显著影响，导致生成的运动往往物理不一致。
AI.method: 提出了身份感知运动生成框架，使用自然语言描述和视觉线索等多模态信号表示身份，引入联合运动-形状生成范式，同时合成运动序列和身体形状参数，让身份线索直接调制运动动力学。
AI.result: 在动作捕捉数据集和大规模真实视频上进行的广泛实验表明，该方法在保持高运动质量的同时，显著提升了运动真实性和运动-身份一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地将身体形态特征融入文本驱动的人体运动生成中，为生成物理一致且具有个体特征的运动提供了新的解决方案。

title: CroSearch-R1: Better Leveraging Cross-lingual Knowledge for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: A multilingual collection may contain useful knowledge in other languages to supplement and correct the facts in the original language for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). However, the vanilla approach that simply concatenates multiple pieces of knowledge from different languages into the context may fail to improve effectiveness due to the potential disparities across languages. To better leverage multilingual knowledge, we propose CroSearch-R1, a search-augmented reinforcement learning framework to integrate multilingual knowledge into the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) process. In particular, the approach adopts a multi-turn retrieval strategy with cross-lingual knowledge integration to dynamically align the knowledge from other languages as supplementary evidence into a unified representation space. Furthermore, we introduce a multilingual rollout mechanism to optimize reasoning transferability across languages. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework effectively leverages cross-lingual complementarity and improves the effectiveness of RAG with multilingual collections.

AI.tldr: CroSearch-R1是一个结合搜索增强和强化学习的框架，能够有效整合多语言知识来提升RAG系统的效果，通过跨语言知识对齐和多语言推理优化实现更好的跨语言知识互补。
AI.motivation: 多语言集合中包含其他语言的有用知识，可以补充和修正RAG中原始语言的事实，但简单拼接不同语言知识的方法可能因语言差异而失效，需要更有效的方法来利用多语言知识。
AI.method: 提出CroSearch-R1框架，采用多轮检索策略和跨语言知识整合，将其他语言的知识动态对齐到统一的表示空间作为补充证据，并引入多语言推演机制来优化跨语言推理的可迁移性，集成到GRPO过程中。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该框架有效利用了跨语言互补性，显著提升了使用多语言集合的RAG系统效果。
AI.conclusion: CroSearch-R1通过搜索增强的强化学习和跨语言知识对齐机制，成功解决了多语言RAG中的知识整合问题，为多语言检索增强生成提供了新的解决方案。

title: Benchmarking OCR Pipelines with Adaptive Enhancement for Multi-Domain Retail Bill Digitization
summary: The digitization of multi-domain retail billing documents remains a challenging task due to variability in scan quality, layout heterogeneity, and domain diversity across commercial sectors. This paper proposes and benchmarks an intelligent, quality-aware adaptive Optical Character Recognition (OCR) pipeline for retail bill digitization spanning five domains: grocery stores, restaurants, hardware shops, footwear outlets, and clothing retailers. The proposed system integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based image enhancement module trained via self-supervised denoising, a Laplacian variance-based image quality analyzer with three-tier routing, a confidence-driven adaptive feedback loop with iterative retry, and an NLP-based post-OCR correction layer. Experiments were conducted on a real-world dataset of 360 heterogeneous retail bill images. Ground truth for quantitative evaluation was generated using an OCR ensemble majority voting strategy, a validated approach for scenarios without manual annotation. The proposed pipeline achieves a Character Error Rate (CER) of 18.4% and Word Error Rate (WER) of 27.6%, representing improvements of 26.4% and 31.2% respectively over the Raw Tesseract baseline. The pipeline additionally achieves a text density of 108.3 words per image, a noise ratio of 2.3%, and a processing time of 3.64 seconds per image - a 6.4x speed advantage over EasyOCR. Image quality PSNR analysis on enhanced MEDIUM and LOW quality images yields an average of 28.7 dB, confirming meaningful enhancement. These results establish a reproducible benchmark for multi-domain retail bill OCR research.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种智能质量感知的自适应OCR管道，用于多领域零售票据数字化，在360张真实票据图像上测试，字符错误率降至18.4%，比基线提升26.4%。
AI.motivation: 多领域零售票据数字化面临扫描质量变化、布局异构性和商业领域多样性三大挑战，需要更智能的OCR解决方案。
AI.method: 整合了四项核心技术：CNN自监督去噪图像增强模块、拉普拉斯方差图像质量分析与三层路由、置信度驱动自适应反馈循环、NLP后校正层，使用OCR集成多数投票生成真值。
AI.result: 在360张零售票据上实现CER 18.4%、WER 27.6%，处理速度3.64秒/图像(比EasyOCR快6.4倍)，图像增强PSNR达28.7dB，噪声率仅2.3%。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个可重现的多领域零售票据OCR基准，验证了质量感知自适应管道的有效性，为后续研究奠定了基础。

title: BARRED: Synthetic Training of Custom Policy Guardrails via Asymmetric Debate
summary: Deploying guardrails for custom policies remains challenging, as generic safety models fail to capture task-specific requirements, while prompting LLMs suffers from inconsistent boundary-case performance and high inference costs. Training custom classifiers achieves both accuracy and efficiency, yet demands substantial labeled data that is costly to obtain. We present BARRED (Boundary Alignment Refinement through REflection and Debate), a framework for generating faithful and diverse synthetic training data using only a task description and a small set of unlabeled examples. Our approach decomposes the domain space into dimensions to ensure comprehensive coverage, and employs multi-agent debate to verify label correctness, yielding a high-fidelity training corpus. Experiments across diverse custom policies demonstrate that small language models finetuned on our synthetic data consistently outperform state-of-the-art proprietary LLMs (including reasoning models) and dedicated guardrail models. Ablation studies confirm that both dimension decomposition and debate-based verification are critical for ensuring the diversity and label fidelity required for effective fine-tuning. The BARRED framework eliminates the reliance on extensive human annotation, offering a scalable solution for accurate custom guardrails.

AI.tldr: BARRED框架通过维度分解和多智能体辩论，仅需少量样本即可生成高质量的合成训练数据，使小型语言模型在自定义保护任务中超越专有大模型
AI.motivation: 为自定义策略部署保护护栏面临挑战：通用安全模型无法捕获特定任务需求，LLM提示存在边界案例性能不一致和高推理成本，而训练自定义分类器需要大量昂贵的标注数据
AI.method: BARRED框架通过将域空间分解为维度确保全面覆盖，并采用多智能体辩论验证标签正确性，仅使用任务描述和少量未标记示例生成忠实且多样化的合成训练数据
AI.result: 在多种自定义策略实验中，使用BARRED合成数据微调的小型语言模型持续超越最先进的专有LLM（包括推理模型）和专用保护模型，消融研究证实维度分解和基于辩论的验证对确保数据多样性和标签保真度至关重要
AI.conclusion: BARRED框架消除了对大量人工标注的依赖，为准确的自定义保护护栏提供了可扩展的解决方案

title: Lightweight Real-Time Rendering Parameter Optimization via XGBoost-Driven Lookup Tables
summary: Achieving a desirable balance between rendering quality and real-time performance is a long-standing challenge in modern game and rendering engines, particularly on resource-constrained mobile devices such as laptops, tablets, and smartphones. Existing approaches to automatic rendering parameter optimization either depend on exhaustive per-scene pre-computation that spans several days, suffer from the prohibitive inference overhead of neural networks that prevents per-frame adaptation, or lack generalizability across heterogeneous hardware and diverse scenes. In this paper, we propose \textbf{LUT-Opt}, a lightweight, general-purpose framework for adaptive per-frame rendering parameter optimization. Our method decomposes the joint optimization of rendering time and image quality into a tractable two-stage pipeline. In the offline stage, we train a pair of XGBoost regressors to predict rendering time and image quality from rendering parameters, hardware state, and scene complexity descriptors. The trained ensemble models are then distilled into compact lookup tables (LUTs) through systematic discretization and a two-phase linear search that first constrains rendering time and subsequently maximizes structural similarity (SSIM). During runtime, the pre-computed LUT is queried every frame in sub-millisecond time, enabling truly adaptive parameter selection with negligible computational overhead. We validate LUT-Opt on two representative rendering techniques -- subsurface scattering (SSS) and hybrid-pipeline ambient occlusion (AO) -- implemented within Unreal Engine 5. Extensive experiments across multiple scenes and GPU configurations demonstrate that LUT-Opt reduces subsurface scattering rendering time by approximately 40\% and ambient occlusion rendering time by roughly 70\%, while incurring only about 2\% increase in image quality error, with per-frame inference latency below 0.1\ ms.

AI.tldr: LUT-Opt是一个轻量级的自适应实时渲染参数优化框架，通过将机器学习模型蒸馏为查找表(LUT)，实现毫秒级参数调整，在移动设备上显著提升渲染性能。
AI.motivation: 在现代游戏和渲染引擎中，特别是在资源受限的移动设备上，如何在渲染质量和实时性能之间达到理想平衡是一个长期挑战。现有方法要么需要耗时的预计算，要么神经推理开销过大，要么缺乏跨硬件和场景的通用性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段优化流程：离线训练XGBoost回归器预测渲染时间和图像质量，通过系统离散化和两阶段线性搜索将模型蒸馏为紧凑的查找表；运行时每帧查询LUT进行参数选择，实现亚毫秒级推理。
AI.result: 在Unreal Engine 5中验证SSS和AO技术，实验表明LUT-Opt分别减少SSS渲染时间约40%和AO渲染时间约70%，图像质量误差仅增加2%，每帧推理延迟低于0.1毫秒。
AI.conclusion: LUT-Opt通过查找表技术实现了高效、通用的实时渲染参数自适应优化，为移动设备的实时渲染应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Below-Chance Blindness: Prompted Underperformance in Small LLMs Produces Positional Bias Rather than Answer Avoidance
summary: Detecting sandbagging--the deliberate underperformance on capability evaluations--is an open problem in AI safety. We tested whether symptom validity testing (SVT) logic from clinical malingering detection could identify sandbagging through below-chance performance (BCB) on forced-choice items. In a pre-registered pilot at the 7-9 billion parameter instruction-tuned scale (3 models, 4 MMLU-Pro domains, 4 conditions, 500 items per cell, 24,000 total trials), the plausibility gate failed. Zero of 12 model-domain cells showed significant below-chance performance under sandbagging instruction. Exploratory analyses revealed three qualitatively distinct failure modes. Qwen-2.5-7B and Phi-3.5-mini largely ignored the sandbagging instruction, with 62-88% response identity with the honest baseline. Llama-3-8B complied substantially but implemented underperformance as a positional heuristic, collapsing its response distribution onto middle-alphabet options (E at 31.8%, F at 26.1%) regardless of where the correct answer fell. This produced accuracy boosts of up to 33 percentage points when the correct answer coincidentally occupied the model's preferred position.
