AI.result: 构建了包含10,217张GPT-Image-2图像的数据集，分析了图像特征，发现关键问题：Twitter CDN系统性剥离C2PA内容凭据，使加密溯源验证不可行。同时发现82%图像包含可检测文本，59.2%包含人脸。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为AI图像研究提供了重要资源，但社交媒体平台的处理方式严重影响了AI图像的可验证性和溯源能力。

title: LLM-ReSum: A Framework for LLM Reflective Summarization through Self-Evaluation
summary: Reliable evaluation of large language model (LLM)-generated summaries remains an open challenge, particularly across heterogeneous domains and document lengths. We conduct a comprehensive meta-evaluation of 14 automatic summarization metrics and LLM-based evaluators across seven datasets spanning five domains, covering documents from short news articles to long scientific, governmental, and legal texts (2K-27K words) with over 1,500 human-annotated summaries. Our results show that traditional lexical overlap metrics (e.g., ROUGE, BLEU) exhibit weak or negative correlation with human judgments, while task-specific neural metrics and LLM-based evaluators achieve substantially higher alignment, especially for linguistic quality assessment. Leveraging these findings, we propose LLM-ReSum, a self-reflective summarization framework that integrates LLM-based evaluation and generation in a closed feedback loop without model finetuning. Across three domains, LLM-ReSum improves low-quality summaries by up to 33% in factual accuracy and 39% in coverage, with human evaluators preferring refined summaries in 89% of cases. We additionally introduce PatentSumEval, a new human-annotated benchmark for legal document summarization comprising 180 expert-evaluated summaries. All code and datasets will be released in GitHub.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了14种自动摘要指标在不同领域的表现，提出了基于大语言模型的自反思摘要框架LLM-ReSum，显著提升了摘要质量，并发布了法律文档摘要评测基准PatentSumEval。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型生成的摘要质量评估仍是一个开放挑战，特别是在异构领域和不同文档长度下，传统评估指标如ROUGE与人类判断的相关性较弱。
AI.method: 通过跨7个数据集、5个领域的元评估分析，包含1500多个人工标注摘要，比较传统指标、神经度量指标和LLM评估器；基于研究结果提出LLM-ReSum框架，在无需微调的情况下将LLM评估与生成集成在闭环反馈中。
AI.result: 传统词汇重叠指标与人类判断相关性弱或负相关，而任务特定神经指标和LLM评估器实现更高对齐；LLM-ReSum在三个领域中分别提升事实准确性33%和覆盖度39%，89%情况下人类评估者偏好改进后的摘要。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为LLM摘要评估提供了全面insights，证明了LLM评估器的有效性，提出的LLM-ReSum框架显著改善了摘要质量，新发布的PatentSumEval基准将推动法律文档摘要研究发展。

title: CoRE: Concept-Reasoning Expansion for Continual Brain Lesion Segmentation
summary: Accurate brain lesion segmentation in MRI is vital for effective clinical diagnosis and treatment planning. Due to high annotation costs and strict data privacy regulations, universal models require employing Continual Learning (CL) to adapt to evolving clinical tasks without losing previously acquired knowledge. However, existing CL paradigms often suffer from capacity limits or redundant parameter growth, and even advanced dynamic methods rely mostly on image-perception strategies that struggle to handle the substantial pathological and multimodal heterogeneity inherent in brain imaging. To address this issue, we propose Concept-Reasoning Expansion (CoRE) framework, which establishes a joint decision-making mechanism by integrating visual features with structured concepts. Through the alignment of image tokens with a hierarchical concept library, CoRE simulates clinical reasoning to guide both interpretable expert routing and demand-based model growth. This collaborative process ensures model evolution is grounded in clinical priors, preventing redundant parameter expansion while maximizing knowledge reuse. Extensive evaluations across 12 sequential brain lesion MRI tasks demonstrate that CoRE achieves state-of-the-art performance and provides a high knowledge starting point for efficient future adaptation. Its superior few-shot transferability and clinical interpretability further validate its effectiveness in managing non-stationary clinical data streams. Our code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: CoRE框架提出了一种概念推理扩展机制，通过整合视觉特征与结构化概念，实现高效的脑部病变MRI持续学习分割。
AI.motivation: 脑部病变MRI准确分割对临床诊断至关重要，但由于标注成本高和数据隐私限制，现有持续学习方法存在容量限制、参数冗余增长问题，且无法有效处理脑部成像中的病理学和多模态异质性。
AI.method: 提出CoRE框架，建立视觉特征与结构化概念的联合决策机制。通过图像标记与层次化概念库的匹配，模拟临床推理过程，指导可解释专家路由和按需模型增长。
AI.result: 在12个连续脑部病变MRI任务上的广泛评估表明，CoRE达到最先进性能，为高效未来适配提供了高知识起点，具备优秀的少样本迁移能力和临床可解释性。
AI.conclusion: CoRE通过概念推理扩展，成功解决了现有持续学习方法在脑部病变分割中的局限性，实现了参数高效增长、知识复用最大化，为非平稳临床数据流管理提供了有效解决方案。

title: Modeling Human-Like Color Naming Behavior in Context
summary: Modeling the emergence of human-like lexicons in computational systems has advanced through the use of interacting neural agents, which simulate both learning and communicative pressures. The NeLLCom-Lex framework (Zhang et al., 2025) allows neural agents to develop pragmatic color naming behavior and human-like lexicons through supervised learning (SL) from human data and reinforcement learning (RL) in referential games. Despite these successes, the lexicons that emerge diverge systematically from human color categories, producing highly non-convex regions in color space, which contrast with the convexity typical of human categories. To address this, we introduce two factors, upsampling rare color terms during SL and multi-listener RL interactions, and adopt a convexity measure to quantify geometric coherence. We find that upsampling improves lexical diversity and system-level informativeness of the color lexicon, while many-listener setups promote more convex color categories. The combination of moderate upsampling and multiple listeners produces lexicons most similar to human systems.

AI.tldr: 通过上采样稀有颜色术语和多听众强化学习交互，可以显著改善神经代理产生的颜色词汇系统，使其在词汇多样性、信息性和几何结构上更接近人类。
AI.motivation: 现有神经代理通过监督学习和强化学习产生的颜色词汇与人类类别存在系统性差异，主要表现为颜色空间中高度非凸的区域，这与人类典型的凸性类别特征不符。
AI.method: 在NeLLCom-Lex框架中引入两个关键改进：1)在监督学习阶段对稀有颜色术语进行上采样；2)采用多听众强化学习交互设置，并使用凸性度量来量化颜色空间的几何一致性。
AI.result: 上采样提高了词汇多样性和词汇系统的信息性，多听众设置促进了更凸的颜色类别形成。中等程度的上采样结合多听众产生的词汇系统最接近人类。
AI.conclusion: 适当的上采样策略和多听众交互机制是产生类人颜色词汇系统的关键因素，为计算语言系统中人类类别形成的研究提供了重要见解。

title: Benchmarking and Improving GUI Agents in High-Dynamic Environments
summary: Recent advancements in Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have predominantly focused on training paradigms like supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). However, the challenge of high-dynamic GUI environments remains largely underexplored. Existing agents typically rely on a single screenshot after each action for decision-making, leading to a partially observable (or even unobservable) Markov decision process, where the key GUI state including important information for actions is often inadequately captured. To systematically explore this challenge, we introduce DynamicGUIBench, a comprehensive online GUI benchmark spanning ten applications and diverse interaction scenarios characterized by important interface changes between actions. Furthermore, we present DynamicUI, an agent designed for dynamic interfaces, which takes screen-recording videos of the interaction process as input and consists of three components: a dynamic perceiver, a refinement strategy, and a reflection. Specifically, the dynamic perceiver clusters frames of the GUI video, generates captions for the centroids, and iteratively selects the most informative frames as the salient dynamic context. Considering that there may be inconsistencies and noise between the selected frames and the textual context of the agent, the refinement strategy employs an action-conditioned filtering to refine thoughts to mitigate thought-action inconsistency and redundancy. Based on the refined agent trajectories, the reflection module provides effective and accurate guidance for further actions. Experiments on DynamicGUIBench demonstrate that DynamicUI significantly improves the performance in dynamic GUI environments, while maintaining competitive performance on other public benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DynamicGUIBench动态GUI基准和DynamicUI智能体，通过使用屏幕录制视频而非单一截图来捕捉动态界面变化，显著提升了动态GUI环境下的任务执行性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体主要依赖单张截图进行决策，在高度动态的GUI环境中存在部分可观测性问题，关键的GUI状态信息往往无法被充分捕捉，限制了智能体的决策效果。
AI.method: 提出了DynamicUI智能体框架，包含三个核心组件：1)动态感知器通过聚类GUI视频帧生成描述并选择最有信息量的帧作为显著动态上下文；2)优化策略采用动作条件过滤减少思维-动作不一致和冗余；3)反思模块基于优化后的轨迹提供准确的进一步动作指导。
AI.result: 在DynamicGUIBench基准上的实验表明，DynamicUI显著提升了动态GUI环境下的任务处理能力，同时在其他公共基准上保持了竞争力的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用屏幕录制视频的时序信息和多组件协作设计，DynamicUI有效解决了传统GUI智能体在动态环境中的部分可观测性问题，为处理复杂的GUI交互任务提供了新的解决思路。

title: CORAL: Adaptive Retrieval Loop for Culturally-Aligned Multilingual RAG
summary: Multilingual retrieval-augmented generation (mRAG) is often implemented within a fixed retrieval space, typically via query or document translation or multilingual embedding vector representations. However, this approach may be inadequate for culturally grounded queries, in which retrieval-condition misalignment may occur. Even strong retrievers and generators may struggle to produce culturally relevant answers when sourcing evidence from inappropriate linguistic or regional contexts. To this end, we introduce CORAL (COntext-aware Retrieval with Agentic Loop, an adaptive retrieval methodology for mRAG that enables iterative refinement of both the retrieval space (corpora) and the retrieval probe (query) based on the quality of the evidence. The overall process includes: (1) selecting corpora, (2) retrieving documents, (3) critiquing evidence for relevance and cultural alignment, and (4) checking sufficiency. If the retrieved documents are insufficient to answer the query correctly, the system (5) reselects corpora and rewrites the query. Across two cultural QA benchmarks, CORAL achieves up to a 3.58%p accuracy improvement on low-resource languages relative to the strongest baselines.

AI.tldr: CORAL是一种针对多语言检索增强生成的自适应检索方法，通过迭代优化检索空间和查询来解决文化背景相关的检索-条件错位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的多语言检索增强生成方法使用固定检索空间，在处理文化背景查询时可能出现检索-条件错位，导致检索器和生成器难以产生文化相关的答案。
AI.method: CORAL通过智能代理循环实现：1)选择语料库，2)检索文档，3)评估证据的相关性和文化对齐度，4)检查充分性。如证据不足，则5)重新选择语料库并重写查询。
AI.result: 在两个文化问答基准测试中，CORAL相比最强基线在低资源语言上实现了最高3.58个百分点的准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 自适应的检索空间和查询优化是解决文化相关多语言检索增强生成中检索-条件错位问题的有效方法，特别是在低资源语言场景下效果显著。

title: COMPASS: COmpact Multi-channel Prior-map And Scene Signature for Floor-Plan-Based Visual Localization
summary: Architectural floor plans are widely available priors which contain not only geometry but also the semantic information of the environment, yet existing localization methods largely ignore this semantic information. To address this, we present COMPASS, an algorithm that exploits both geometric and semantic priors from floor plans to estimate the pose of a robot equipped with dual fisheye cameras. Inspired by scan context descriptor from LiDAR-based place recognition, we design a multi-channel radial descriptor that encodes the geometric layout surrounding a position. From the floor plan, rays are cast in 360 azimuth bins and the results are encoded into five channels: normalized range, structural hit type (wall, window, or opening), range gradient, inverse range, and local range variance. From the image side, the same descriptor structure is populated by detecting structural elements in the fisheye imagery. As a first step toward full cross-modal matching, we present a window detection algorithm for fisheye images that uses a line segment detector to identify window frames via vertical edge clustering and brightness verification. Detected windows are projected to azimuthal bearings through the fisheye camera model, producing the hit-type channel of the visual descriptor. As a proof of concept, we generate both descriptors at a single known pose from the Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026 dataset and demonstrate that the wall-window pattern extracted from the first frame of each camera closely matches the floor plan descriptor, validating the feasibility of cross-modal structural matching.

AI.tldr: COMPASS算法利用建筑平面图的几何和语义先验信息，结合双鱼眼相机图像，通过设计多通道径向描述符实现机器人位姿估计，并验证了跨模态结构匹配的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有定位方法很大程度上忽略了建筑平面图中包含的丰富语义信息，仅利用几何信息进行定位，限制了定位精度和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 受LiDAR扫描上下文描述符启发，设计多通道径向描述符，包含5个通道：归一化距离、结构命中类型（墙壁、窗户或开口）、距离梯度、距离倒数和局部距离方差。通过360度方位角射线投影生成平面图描述符，并在鱼眼图像中检测窗户等结构元素生成视觉描述符。
AI.result: 在Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026数据集上，从已知姿态生成的两种描述符在墙壁-窗户模式上能够很好匹配，验证了跨模态结构匹配方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功将建筑平面图的语义信息整合到视觉定位中，为实现完整的跨模态匹配奠定了基础，有望提升室内机器人的定位性能。

title: Backtranslation Augmented Direct Preference Optimization for Neural Machine Translation
summary: Contemporary neural machine translation (NMT) systems are almost exclusively built by training on supervised parallel data. Despite the tremendous progress achieved, these systems still exhibit persistent translation errors. This paper proposes that a post-training paradigm based on reinforcement learning (RL) can effectively rectify such mistakes. We introduce a novel framework that requires only a general text corpus and an expert translator which can be either human or an AI system to provide iterative feedback. In our experiments, we focus specifically on English-to-German translation as a representative high-resource language pair. Crucially, we implement this RL-based post-training using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Applying our DPO-driven framework to the gemma3-1b model yields a significant improvement in translation quality, elevating it's COMET score from 0.703 to 0.747 on the English to German task. The results demonstrate that DPO offers an efficient and stable pathway for enhancing pre-trained NMT models through preference-based post-training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的后训练方法，直接偏好优化(DPO)显著提升了神经机器翻译质量，COMET分数从0.703提高至0.747。
AI.motivation: 当前神经机器翻译系统虽然发展迅速，但仍存在持续的翻译错误，需要有效的方法来纠正这些错误。
AI.method: 提出使用直接偏好优化(DPO)的后训练框架，仅需一般文本语料和专家翻译器(人或AI)提供迭代反馈，应用于英德翻译任务。
AI.result: 在gemma3-1b模型上应用DPO框架，英德翻译的COMET评分从0.703提升至0.747，显著改善了翻译质量。
AI.conclusion: DPO为通过偏好化后训练提升预训练神经机器翻译模型提供了一条高效稳定的路径。

title: Leveraging Previous-Traversal Point Cloud Map Priors for Camera-Based 3D Object Detection and Tracking
summary: Camera-based 3D object detection and tracking are central to autonomous driving, yet precise 3D object localization remains fundamentally constrained by depth ambiguity when no expensive, depth-rich online LiDAR is available at inference. In many deployments, however, vehicles repeatedly traverse the same environments, making static point cloud maps from prior traversals a practical source of geometric priors. We propose DualViewMapDet, a camera-only inference framework that retrieves such map priors online and leverages them to mitigate the absence of a LiDAR sensor during deployment. The key idea is a dual-space camera-map fusion strategy that avoids one-sided view conversion. Specifically, we (i) project the map into perspective view (PV) and encode multi-channel geometric cues to enrich image features and support BEV lifting, and (ii) encode the map directly in bird's-eye view (BEV) with a sparse voxel backbone and fuse it with lifted camera features in a shared metric space. Extensive evaluations on nuScenes and Argoverse 2 demonstrate consistent improvements over strong camera-only baselines, with particularly strong gains in object localization. Ablations further validate the contributions of PV/BEV fusion and prior-map coverage. We make the code and pre-trained models available at https://dualviewmapdet.cs.uni-freiburg.de .

AI.tldr: DualViewMapDet提出了一种摄像头+先验地图的3D目标检测框架，通过双空间融合策略有效解决了纯摄像头方法中的深度模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶中，纯摄像头3D目标检测存在深度模糊问题，而LiDAR成本昂贵。车辆经常重复行驶相同路线，可以利用先验点云地图作为几何先验来解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 提出双空间摄像头-地图融合策略：(1)将地图投影到透视视图(PV)并编码多通道几何线索增强图像特征，(2)在鸟瞰图(BEV)中直接编码地图，通过稀疏体干网络与摄像头特征在共享度量空间中融合。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2数据集上，该方法相比强纯摄像头基线取得了持续改进，在目标定位方面提升尤为显著。消融实验验证了PV/BEV融合和先验地图覆盖的贡献。
AI.conclusion: DualViewMapDet成功利用先验地图显著提升了纯摄像头3D检测性能，特别是在目标定位精度方面，为无LiDAR的自动驾驶系统提供了一种实用的解决方案。

title: Cross-Lingual Jailbreak Detection via Semantic Codebooks
summary: Safety mechanisms for large language models (LLMs) remain predominantly English-centric, creating systematic vulnerabilities in multilingual deployment. Prior work shows that translating malicious prompts into other languages can substantially increase jailbreak success rates, exposing a structural cross-lingual security gap. We investigate whether such attacks can be mitigated through language-agnostic semantic similarity without retraining or language-specific adaptation. Our approach compares multilingual query embeddings against a fixed English codebook of jailbreak prompts, operating as a training-free external guardrail for black-box LLMs. We conduct a systematic evaluation across four languages, two translation pipelines, four safety benchmarks, three embedding models, and three target LLMs (Qwen, Llama, GPT-3.5). Our results reveal two distinct regimes of cross-lingual transfer. On curated benchmarks containing canonical jailbreak templates, semantic similarity generalizes reliably across languages, achieving near-perfect separability (AUC up to 0.99) and substantial reductions in absolute attack success rates under strict low-false-positive constraints. However, under distribution shift - on behaviorally diverse and heterogeneous unsafe benchmarks - separability degrades markedly (AUC $\approx$ 0.60-0.70), and recall in the security-critical low-FPR regime drops across all embedding models.

AI.tldr: 研究通过跨语言语义相似度检测攻击提示来保护大语言模型的多语言安全，发现在标准基准测试中有效但在分布外场景下性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型的安全机制主要针对英语，导致多语言部署时存在系统性漏洞。恶意提示通过翻译到其他语言就能绕过安全防护，暴露了跨语言安全缺口。
AI.method: 采用训练无关的外部护栏方法，将多语言查询嵌入与固定的英语越狱提示码本进行比较，无需重新训练或语言特定适配。使用多语言嵌入模型实现跨语言语义相似度检测。
AI.result: 在包含经典越狱模板的基准测试中，语义相似度检测达到近乎完美的分离能力（AUC最高0.99）；但在行为多样性的异构不安全基准上，分离能力显著退化（AUC约0.60-0.70），安全关键的低误报率下召回率下降。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言语义相似度在标准场景下能有效防御越狱攻击，但面对分布偏移时鲁棒性不足，说明仅靠语义相似度难以解决所有跨语言安全问题，需要更复杂的多层防护策略。

title: Beyond Fidelity: Semantic Similarity Assessment in Low-Level Image Processing
summary: Low-level image processing has long been evaluated mainly from the perspective of visual fidelity. However, with the rise of deep learning and generative models, processed images may preserve perceptual quality while altering semantic content, making conventional Image Quality Assessment (IQA) insufficient for semantic-level assessment. In this paper, we formalize \textit{Semantic Similarity} as a new evaluation task for low-level image processing, aimed at measuring whether semantic content is preserved after processing. We further present a structured formulation of image semantics based on semantic entities and their relations, and discuss the desired properties and constraints of a valid semantic similarity index. Based on this formulation, we propose Triplet-based Semantic Similarity Score (T3S), which models image semantics through foreground entities, background entities, and relations. T3S combines semantic entity extraction, foreground-background disentanglement, and open-world class/relation modeling. Experiments on COCO and SPA-Data show that T3S consistently outperforms existing fidelity-oriented metrics and representative semantic-level baselines, while better reflecting progressive semantic changes under diverse degradations. These results highlight the importance of semantic assessment in modern low-level vision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了语义相似性作为低级图像处理的新评估任务，并开发了T3S指标来评估处理后的图像是否保持了语义内容的完整性。
AI.motivation: 传统的图像质量评估主要关注视觉保真度，但在深度学习和生成模型时代，处理后的图像可能在保持感知质量的同时改变了语义内容，这使得传统IQA方法无法有效评估语义层面的变化。
AI.method: 提出了T3S（基于三元组的语义相似性评分）方法，该方法通过前景实体、背景实体和它们之间的关系来建模图像语义，结合了语义实体提取、前景-背景解耦和开放世界的类别/关系建模。
AI.result: 在COCO和SPA-Data数据集上的实验表明，T3S在评估语义相似性方面始终优于现有的保真度导向指标和代表性的语义层面基线方法，同时能更好地反映在各种退化条件下的渐进性语义变化。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了在现代低级视觉任务中语义评估的重要性，为低级图像处理提供了新的语义层面的评估标准和工具。

title: CGU-ILALab at FoodBench-QA 2026: Comparing Traditional and LLM-based Approaches for Recipe Nutrient Estimation
comment: Accepted by the Third Workshop on Patient-oriented Language Processing (CL4Health) at LREC 2026
summary: Accurate nutrient estimation from unstructured recipe text is an important yet challenging problem in dietary monitoring, due to ambiguous ingredient terminology and highly variable quantity expressions. We systematically evaluate models spanning a wide range of representational capacity, from lexical matching methods (TF-IDF with Ridge Regression), to deep semantic encoders (DeBERTa-v3), to generative reasoning with large language models (LLMs). Under the strict tolerance criteria defined by EU Regulation 1169/2011, our empirical results reveal a clear trade-off between predictive accuracy and computational efficiency. The TF-IDF baseline achieves moderate nutrient estimation performance with near-instantaneous inference, whereas the DeBERTa-v3 encoder performs poorly under task-specific data scarcity. In contrast, few-shot LLM inference (e.g., Gemini 2.5 Flash) and a hybrid LLM refinement pipeline (TF-IDF combined with Gemini 2.5 Flash) deliver the highest validation accuracy across all nutrient categories. These improvements likely arise from the ability of LLMs to leverage pre-trained world knowledge to resolve ambiguous terminology and normalize non-standard units, which remain difficult for purely lexical approaches. However, these gains come at the cost of substantially higher inference latency, highlighting a practical deployment trade-off between real-time efficiency and nutritional precision in dietary monitoring systems.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了从食谱文本中准确估算营养成分的不同方法，发现大型语言模型(LLM)在精度上表现最佳，但计算成本高；传统TF-IDF方法速度快但精度中等。
AI.motivation: 从非结构化食谱文本中准确估算营养素是饮食监控中重要但具有挑战性的问题，主要困难在于成分术语模糊和数量表达高度变化。
AI.method: 系统评估了从词汇匹配方法(TF-IDF+岭回归)、深度语义编码器(DeBERTa-v3)到生成式推理的大型语言模型等多种方法，并在欧盟EU Regulation 1169/2011的严格容差标准下进行比较。
AI.result: TF-IDF基准方法推理速度近瞬时但精度中等；DeBERTa-v3在任务数据稀缺时表现不佳；少样本LLM推理(Gemini 2.5 Flash)和混合LLM refining管道在所有营养类别中验证精度最高。
AI.conclusion: LLM通过利用预训练的世界知识解决了模糊术语和非标准单位的标准化问题，但需要承担更高的推理延迟成本，揭示了饮食监控系统中实时效率与营养精度之间的实际部署权衡。

title: A Systematic Post-Train Framework for Video Generation
summary: While large-scale video diffusion models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in generating high-resolution and semantically rich content, a significant gap remains between their pretraining performance and real-world deployment requirements due to critical issues such as prompt sensitivity, temporal inconsistency, and prohibitive inference costs. To bridge this gap, we propose a comprehensive post-training framework that systematically aligns pretrained models with user intentions through four synergistic stages: we first employ Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to transform the base model into a stable instruction-following policy, followed by a Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) stage that utilizes a novel Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) method tailored for video diffusion to enhance perceptual quality and temporal coherence; subsequently, we integrate Prompt Enhancement via a specialized language model to refine user inputs, and finally address system efficiency through Inference Optimization. Together, these components provide a systematic approach to improving visual quality, temporal coherence, and instruction following, while preserving the controllability learned during pretraining. The result is a practical blueprint for building scalable post-training pipelines that are stable, adaptable, and effective in real-world deployment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this unified pipeline effectively mitigates common artifacts and significantly improves controllability and visual aesthetics while adhering to strict sampling cost constraints.

AI.tldr: 针对大规模视频扩散模型的部署难题，提出包含监督微调、强化学习、提示词增强和推理优化的四阶段后训练框架。
AI.motivation: 预训练的视频扩散模型虽能生成高质量内容，但在实际部署中面临提示词敏感、时序不一致、推理成本过高等关键问题，导致预训练性能与现实需求存在显著差距。
AI.method: 通过四个协同阶段实现系统化对齐：1) 监督微调将基础模型转为稳定的指令遵循策略；2) 提出专用于视频扩散的群体相对策略优化(GRPO)的强化学习方法；3) 集成专用语言模型进行提示词增强；4) 实施推理优化提升系统效率。
AI.result: 实验证明该统一管道有效减少常见伪影，显著提升可控性和视觉美感，同时严格遵守采样成本限制，为构建可扩展、稳定、适应性的后训练管道提供了实用方案。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功弥合了视频扩散模型预训练与实际部署间的差距，在保持预训练可控性的同时，系统性提升了视觉质量、时序一致性和指令遵循能力，为大规模视频生成模型的产业化应用奠定了基础。

title: Unrequited Emotions: Investigating the Gaps in Motivation and Practice in Speech Emotion Recognition Research
comment: Accepted to the Workshop on Computational Affective Science (CAS) at LREC 2026
summary: Critical analyses of emotion recognition technology have raised ethical concerns around task validity and potential downstream impacts, urging researchers to ensure alignment between their stated motivations and practice. However, these discussions have not adequately influenced or drawn from research on speech emotion recognition (SER). We address this gap by conducting a systematic survey of SER research to uncover what stated motivations drive this work and if they align with the datasets and emotions studied. We find that while SER research identifies appealing goals, such as well-situated voice-activated systems or healthcare applications, commonly-used datasets do not reflect these proposed deployment contexts, thus presenting a gap between motivations and research practices. We argue that such gaps engender ethical concerns, and that SER research should reassert itself with concrete use-cases to prevent misinterpretations, misuse, and downstream harms.

AI.tldr: 语音情感识别(SER)研究的动机与实践之间存在显著脱节，研究使用的情感数据集与宣称的应用场景不符，亟需重新审视并明确具体应用案例。
AI.motivation: 情感识别技术的批评引发了关于任务有效性和潜在影响的伦理担忧，但语音情感识别研究未能充分吸收这些讨论。研究者需要确保其宣称动机与实际研究内容的一致性。
AI.method: 通过对语音情感识别研究进行系统性调查，分析其宣称的研究动机、使用的数据集以及研究的情感类别，揭示动机与实践之间的对应关系。
AI.result: 研究发现SER研究虽然提出了语音激活系统或医疗保健等吸引人的应用目标，但常用的数据集并不能反映这些实际部署场景，暴露了动机与研究实践的明显不一致。
AI.conclusion: 这种动机与实践的脱节会引发伦理问题，SER研究应该重新定位并确立具体的使用案例，以防止误解、误用和下游危害。

title: SARU: A Shadow-Aware and Removal Unified Framework for Remote Sensing Images with New Benchmarks
summary: Shadows are a prevalent problem in remote sensing imagery (RSI), degrading visual quality and severely limiting the performance of downstream tasks like object detection and semantic segmentation. Most prior works treat shadow detection and removal as separate, cascaded tasks, which can lead to cumbersome process and error accumulation. Furthermore, many deep learning methods rely on paired shadow and non-shadow images for training, which are often unavailable in practice. To address these challenges, we propose Shadow-Aware and Removal Unified (SARU) Framework , a cohesive two-stage framework. First, its dual-branch detection module (DBCSF-Net) fuses multi-color space and semantic features to generate high-fidelity shadow masks, effectively distinguishing shadows from dark objects. Then, leveraging these masks, a novel, training-free physical algorithm (N$^2$SGSR) restores illumination by transferring properties from adjacent non-shadow regions within the single input image. To facilitate rigorous evaluation and foster future work, we also introduce two new benchmark datasets: the RSI Shadow Detection (RSISD) dataset and the Single-image Shadow Removal Benchmark (SiSRB). Extensive experiments demonstrate that SARU achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the public AISD dataset and our newly introduced benchmarks. By holistically integrating shadow detection and removal to mitigate error propagation and eliminating the dependency on paired training data, SARU establishes a robust, practical framework for real-world RSI analysis. The source code and datasets are publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/SARU-Framework.

AI.tldr: SARU是一个统一框架，集成阴影检测与去除，使用双分支网络生成高保真阴影掩码，并通过无训练物理算法基于单张图像恢复光照，无需配对训练数据。
AI.motivation: 传统遥感影像处理中阴影检测和去除分离处理导致流程繁琐和误差累积，且现有深度学习方法依赖难以获得的配对训练数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出两阶段SARU框架：1) DBCSF-Net双分支检测模块融合多色彩空间和语义特征生成阴影掩码；2) N²SGSR无训练物理算法利用相邻非阴影区域属性在单张图像内恢复光照。
AI.result: 在公开AISD数据集和新提出的RSISD、SiSRB基准数据集上达到最优性能，有效区分阴影与暗色物体，显著提升遥感影像质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过整体集成阴影检测与去除减少误差传播，消除对配对训练数据的依赖，SARU为实际遥感影像分析建立了强大实用的框架，推动了该领域的发展。

title: Subliminal Steering: Stronger Encoding of Hidden Signals
summary: Subliminal learning describes a student language model inheriting a behavioral bias by fine-tuning on seemingly innocuous data generated by a biased teacher model. Prior work has begun to characterize this phenomenon but leaves open questions about the scope of signals it can transfer, the mechanisms that explain it, and the precision with which a bias can be encoded by seemingly unrelated data. We tackle all three problems by introducing subliminal steering, a variant of subliminal learning in which the teacher's bias is implemented not via a system prompt, as in prior work, but through a steering vector trained to maximize the likelihood of a set of target samples. First, we show that subliminal steering transfers complex multi-word biases, whereas prior work focused on single-word preferences, demonstrating a large scope of subliminally transferrable signals. Second, we provide mechanistic evidence that subliminal learning transfers not only the target behavioral bias, but also the steering vector itself, localized to the layers at which the teacher was steered. Finally, we show that the bias is encoded with surprising precision. We train a new steering vector directly on the subliminally-laden dataset and find that it attains high cosine similarity with the original vector.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过引入'潜意识引导'方法，证明了语言模型可以通过看似无关的数据精确地继承复杂的多词汇偏见，并揭示了其内在机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对潜意识学习现象的信号传输范围、解释机制和偏见编码精度等问题尚无明确答案，需要更深入的研究来填补这些知识空白。
AI.method: 研究者提出了潜意识引导方法，使用通过训练得到的引导向量而非系统提示来实现教师模型的偏见，并在多层级进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法能够传输复杂的多词汇偏见， Bias被精确编码，新训练的引导向量与原始向量具有高余弦相似度。
AI.conclusion: 潜意识学习具有广泛的信号传输能力和精确的编码特性，其机制涉及引导向量在特定层级的直接转移，为理解模型偏见传播提供了新见解。

title: GramSR: Visual Feature Conditioning for Diffusion-Based Super-Resolution
comment: Accepted at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition
summary: Despite recent advances, single-image super-resolution (SR) remains challenging, especially in real-world scenarios with complex degradations. Diffusion-based SR methods, particularly those built on Stable Diffusion, leverage strong generative priors but commonly rely on text conditioning derived from semantic captioning. Such textual descriptions provide only high-level semantics and lack the spatially aligned visual information required for faithful restoration, leading to a representation gap between abstract semantics and spatially aligned visual details. To address this limitation, we propose GramSR, a one-step diffusion-based SR framework that replaces text conditioning with dense visual features extracted from the low-resolution input using a pre-trained DINOv3 encoder. GramSR adopts a three-stage LoRA architecture, where pixel-level, semantic-level, and texture-level LoRA modules are trained sequentially. The pixel-level module focuses on degradation removal using $\ell_2$ loss, the semantic-level module enhances perceptual details via LPIPS and CSD losses, and the texture-level module enforces feature correlation consistency through a Gram matrix loss computed from DINOv3 features. At inference, independent guidance scales enable flexible control over degradation removal, semantic enhancement, and texture preservation. Extensive experiments on standard SR benchmarks demonstrate that GramSR consistently outperforms existing one-step diffusion-based methods, achieving superior structural fidelity and texture realism. The code for this work is available at: https://github.com/aimagelab/GramSR.

AI.tldr: 这项研究提出了GramSR，一种一步式扩散超分辨率框架，它用DINOv3提取的密集视觉特征替代文本引导，通过三级LoRA架构实现更好的图像重建。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于扩散模型的单图像超分辨率方法依赖文本条件，但文本描述只能提供高级语义信息，缺乏空间对齐的视觉信息，导致在抽象语义和空间细节之间存在表示鸿沟，影响重建的保真度。
AI.method: GramSR采用三级LoRA架构：像素级模块（用于退化移除）、语义级模块（通过LPIPS和CSD损失增强感知细节）、纹理级模块（通过DINOv3特征的Gram矩阵损失强制特征相关性一致性）。推理时使用独立的引导尺度灵活控制各阶段效果。
AI.result: 在标准超分辨率基准测试中，GramSR一致性地优于现有的单步扩散方法，实现了更优越的结构保真度和纹理真实感。
AI.conclusion: 通过用密集视觉特征替代文本引导，GramSR有效解决了语义与空间细节的鸿沟问题，证明将预训练视觉编码器与扩散框架结合是提升单步超分辨率性能的有效途径。

title: MAIC-UI: Making Interactive Courseware with Generative UI
comment: You can try our demo at https://open.maic.chat/
summary: Creating interactive STEM courseware traditionally requires HTML/CSS/JavaScript expertise, leaving barriers for educators. While generative AI can produce HTML codes, existing tools generate static presentations rather than interactive simulations, struggle with long documents, and lack pedagogical accuracy mechanisms. Furthermore, full regeneration for modifications requires 200--600 seconds, disrupting creative flow. We present MAIC-UI, a zero-code authoring system that enables educators to create and rapidly edit interactive courseware from textbooks, PPTs, and PDFs. MAIC-UI employs: (1) structured knowledge analysis with multi-modal understanding to ensure pedagogical rigor; (2) a two-stage generate-verify-optimize pipeline separating content alignment from visual refinement; and (3) Click-to-Locate editing with Unified Diff-based incremental generation achieving sub-10-second iteration cycles. A controlled lab study with 40 participants shows MAIC-UI reduces editing iterations (4.9 vs. 7.0) and significantly improves learnability and controllability compared to direct Text-to-HTML generation. A three-month classroom deployment with 53 high school students demonstrates that MAIC-UI fosters learning agency and reduces outcome disparities -- the pilot class achieved 9.21-point gains in STEM subjects compared to -2.32 points in control classes. Our code is available at https://github.com/THU-MAIC/MAIC-UI.

AI.tldr: MAIC-UI是一个零代码创作系统，帮助教育者快速将教科书、PPT和PDF转换为交互式STEM课件，实现10秒内的修改迭代。
AI.motivation: 传统STEM课件创作需要HTML/CSS/JavaScript技能，现有AI工具只能生成静态演示、处理长文档困难且缺乏教学准确性保证，修改时重新生成耗时200-600秒，破坏创作流程。
AI.method: 采用三种核心技术：1）多模理解的结构化知识分析确保教学严谨性；2）两阶段的生成-验证-优化流程，分离内容对齐与视觉优化；3）点击定位编辑与统一差分增量生成，实现亚10秒迭代周期。
AI.result: 实验室研究表明MAIC-UI比直接文本转HTML生成减少编辑迭代次数（4.9 vs 7.0），显著提升学习性和可控性；三个月课堂部署显示试点班级STEM科目成绩提升9.21分，而对照组下降2.32分。
AI.conclusion: MAIC-UI成功解决了教育者创作交互式课件的技术门槛问题，通过快速的增量编辑机制维持创作流畅性，并有效促进学习效果，减少学习结果差异。

title: Image Compression with Bubble-Aware Frame Rate Adaptation for Energy-Efficient Video Capsule Endoscopy
summary: Video Capsule Endoscopy (VCE) is a promising method for improving the medical examination of the small intestine in the gastrointestinal tract. A key challenge is their limited size, resulting in a short battery lifetime which conflicts with high energy consumption for image capturing and transmission to an on-body device. Thus, we propose an image compression pipeline that substantially reduces the transmitted data while preserving diagnostic image quality. Furthermore, we exploit characteristics of the compression process to identify frames with low diagnostic value mainly caused by bubbles, without requiring additional image analysis. For low-visibility frames, a dynamic bubble-aware frame rate adaptation strategy reduces image acquisition and transmission during these phases while preserving sensitivity to potential anomalies. The proposed compression and frame rate adaptation are evaluated on a RISC-V platform using the Kvasir-Capsule and Galar datasets. The compression method achieves a compression ratio of 5.748 (82.6%) at a peak signal-to-noise ratio of 40.3 dB, indicating negligible loss of visual quality. The compression accomplished a mean energy reduction of the whole system by 20.58%. Additionally, the proposed bubble-aware frame rate adaptation reduced the energy consumption by up to 40%. These results demonstrate the potential of our method to increase the applicability of VCE.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对视频胶囊内镜的图像压缩和动态帧率自适应方案，在保持诊断质量的同时显著降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 视频胶囊内镜因体积小导致电池寿命有限，而图像捕获和传输的高能耗与这一限制产生了严重冲突。
AI.method: 设计图像压缩管道减少传输数据，并利用压缩过程特征识别低诊断价值的气泡帧，实施动态气泡感知的帧率自适应策略。
AI.result: 压缩比达5.748，PSNR为40.3dB，系统平均能耗降低20.58%，帧率自适应进一步降低能耗达40%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效延长VCE的工作时间，提高其在临床检查中的实用性和可行性。

title: PSI-Bench: Towards Clinically Grounded and Interpretable Evaluation of Depression Patient Simulators
summary: Patient simulators are gaining traction in mental health training by providing scalable exposure to complex and sensitive patient interactions. Simulating depressed patients is particularly challenging, as safety constraints and high patient variability complicate simulations and underscore the need for simulators that capture diverse and realistic patient behaviors. However, existing evaluations heavily rely on LLM-judges with poorly specified prompts and do not assess behavioral diversity. We introduce PSI-Bench, an automatic evaluation framework that provides interpretable, clinically grounded diagnostics of depression patient simulator behavior across turn-, dialogue-, and population-level dimensions. Using PSI-Bench, we benchmark seven LLMs across two simulator frameworks and find that simulators produce overly long, lexically diverse responses, show reduced variability, resolve emotions too quickly, and follow a uniform negative-to-positive trajectory. We also show that the simulation framework has a larger impact on fidelity than the model scale. Results from a human study demonstrate that our benchmark is strongly aligned with expert judgments. Our work reveals key limitations of current depression patient simulators and provides an interpretable, extensible benchmark to guide future simulator design and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出PSI-Bench自动化评估框架，系统评估了7个大语言模型作为抑郁症患者模拟器的表现，发现当前模拟器存在回应过长、情感转变过快、行为模式单一等问题，且模拟框架比模型规模对保真度影响更大。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症患者模拟器在心理健康培训中需求增长，但现有评估方法存在严重缺陷：过度依赖提示不明确的LLM评判器，缺乏对行为多样性的评估，无法全面衡量模拟器的真实性和有效性。
AI.method: 开发PSI-Bench多维度自动评估框架，从话轮级、对话级和群体级三个层面评估模拟器行为，使用临床依据的诊断指标；对7个LLM在两种模拟框架下进行基准测试；开展人工验证研究证明评估结果与专家判断的一致性。
AI.result: 发现当前抑郁症患者模拟器产生过长且词汇丰富但缺乏变化的回应，情感解决过快，普遍遵循消极到积极的统一轨迹；模拟框架对保真度的影响超过模型规模；人工研究验证了评估结果与专家判断的强相关性。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了当前抑郁症患者模拟器的关键局限性，提供了可解释、可扩展的基准测试工具，为未来模拟器设计和评估提供了指导方向，强调了评估方法标准化和临床依据的重要性。

title: Generalizable Human Gaussian Splatting via Multi-view Semantic Consistency
summary: Recently, generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs has been actively studied for the photorealistic human rendering. Most existing methods rely on explicit geometric constraints or predefined structural representations to accurately position 3D Gaussians. Although these approaches have shown the remarkable progress in this field, they still suffer from inconsistent feature representations across multi-view inputs due to complex articulations of the human body and limited overlaps between different views. To address this problem, we propose a novel method to accurately localize 3D Gaussians and ultimately improve the quality of human rendering. The key idea is to unproject latent embeddings encoded from each viewpoint into a shared 3D space through predicted depth maps and recalibrate them belonging to the same body part based on cross-view attention. This helps the model resolve the spatial ambiguity occurring in highly textured regions as well as occluded body parts, thus leading to the accurate localization of 3D Gaussians. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show that the proposed method efficiently improves the performance of generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的方法，通过预测深度图和跨视角注意力机制，将多视角特征投影到共享3D空间并重新校准，从而改进稀疏输入下的可泛化人体高斯喷溅渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的可泛化人体高斯喷溅方法在处理人体复杂关节运动和视角间有限重叠时，会导致多视角输入的特征表示不一致，影响3D高斯点的精确定位。
AI.method: 通过预测深度图将每个视角的潜在嵌入反投影到共享3D空间，并基于跨视角注意力机制对同一身体部分的3D高斯点进行重新校准，解决空间模糊性问题。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法有效提升了稀疏视角输入下可泛化人体高斯喷溅的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过跨视角注意力校准3D空间中的特征表示，有效解决了人体复杂姿态下的空间模糊问题，显著提高了人体渲染的定位精度和整体质量。

title: Agentic Harness Engineering: Observability-Driven Automatic Evolution of Coding-Agent Harnesses
summary: Harnesses have become a central determinant of coding-agent performance, shaping how models interact with repositories, tools, and execution environments. Yet automating harness engineering is hard: a heterogeneous action space, sparse and noisy evaluation signal, multi-million-token trajectories, and edits whose effect is hard to attribute to the next round's outcomes. We introduce Agentic Harness Engineering (AHE), a framework that automates harness-level evolution by instrumenting the three stages of any engineering loop (component editing, trajectory inspection, and decision making) with matched observability pillars: (1) component observability gives every editable harness component a file-level representation so the action space is explicit and revertible; (2) experience observability distills millions of raw trajectory tokens into a layered, drill-down evidence corpus that an evolving agent can actually consume; and (3) decision observability pairs every edit with a self-declared prediction, later verified against the next round's task-level outcomes. Together, these pillars turn every edit into a falsifiable contract, so harness evolution proceeds autonomously without collapsing into trial-and-error. Empirically, ten AHE iterations lift pass@1 on Terminal-Bench 2 from 69.7% to 77.0%, surpassing the human-designed harness Codex-CLI (71.9%) and the self-evolving baselines ACE and TF-GRPO. The frozen harness transfers without re-evolution: on SWE-bench-verified it tops aggregate success at 12% fewer tokens than the seed, and on Terminal-Bench 2 it yields +5.1 to +10.1pp cross-family gains across three alternate model families, indicating the evolved components encode general engineering experience rather than benchmark-specific tuning. These results position observability-driven evolution as a practical pathway to keep coding-agent harnesses continually improving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic Harness Engineering (AHE)框架，通过三个可观测性支柱实现编码代理harness的自动化进化，在Terminal-Bench 2上将pass@1从69.7%提升至77.0%，超越人工设计的harness，且进化后的harness具有良好的跨模型迁移能力。
AI.motivation: Harness是影响编码代理性能的核心因素，但自动化harness工程面临巨大挑战：异构的动作空间、稀疏且嘈杂的评估信号、数百万token的轨迹长度，以及编辑效果难以归因等问题，导致自动化进化容易陷入试错循环。
AI.method: 提出AHE框架，通过三个可观测性支柱实现harness工程循环的自动化：(1)组件可观测性：为每个可编辑组件提供文件级表示；(2)经验可观测性：将原始轨迹压缩为可分层的证据语料库；(3)决策可观测性：为每次编辑配对自声明预测并与后续结果验证。
AI.result: 十轮AHE迭代在Terminal-Bench 2上达到77.0% pass@1，超过人工设计的Codex-CLI (71.9%)和自进化基线。冻结的harness在SWE-bench-verified上用12%更少token达到聚合成功，在Terminal-Bench 2上为三个不同模型家族带来5.1-10.1pp的跨家族提升。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，AHE能够自主进化出编码通用工程经验的harness组件而非特定基准调优，为编码代理harness的持续改进提供了实用的可观测性驱动进化路径。

title: DDA-Thinker: Decoupled Dual-Atomic Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning-Driven Image Editing
summary: Recent image editing models have achieved strong visual fidelity but often struggle with tasks requiring complex reasoning. To investigate and enhance the reasoning-grounded planning for image editing, we propose DDA-Thinker, a Thinker-centric framework designed for the independent optimization of a planning module (Thinker) over a fixed generative model (Editor). This decoupled Thinker-centric paradigm facilitates a controlled analysis of the planning module and makes its contribution under a fixed Editor easier to assess. To effectively guide this Thinker, we introduce a dual-atomic reinforcement learning framework. This framework decomposes feedback into two distinct atomic rewards implemented through verifiable checklists: a cognitive-atomic reward to directly assess the quality of the Thinker's executable plan, which serves as the actionable outcome of the Thinker's reasoning, and a visual-atomic reward to assess the final image quality. To improve checklist quality, our checklist synthesis is grounded not only in the source image and user instruction but also in a rational reference description of the ideal post-edit scene. To support this training, we further develop a two-stage data curation pipeline that first synthesizes a diverse and reasoning-focused dataset, then applies difficulty-aware refinement to curate an effective training curriculum for reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments on reasoning-driven image editing benchmarks, including RISE-Bench and KRIS-Bench, demonstrate that our approach substantially improves overall performance. Our method enables a community model to achieve results competitive with strong proprietary models, highlighting the practical potential of Thinker-centric optimization under a fixed-editor setting.

AI.tldr: DDA-Thinker是一个以思考者为中心的图像编辑框架，通过双原子强化学习分离规划模块与生成模型的优化，显著提升了复杂推理任务下的图像编辑性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像编辑模型在视觉保真度方面表现良好，但在需要复杂推理的任务中表现不佳，需要专门研究如何增强图像编辑的推理基础规划能力。
AI.method: 提出DDA-Thinker框架，采用思考者-编辑者的分离架构；引入双原子强化学习框架，通过认知原子奖励评估可执行计划质量和视觉原子奖励评估最终图像质量；使用理性参考描述指导检查表合成；开发两阶段数据整理流程进行难度感知的课程学习。
AI.result: 在RISE-Bench和KRIS-Bench等推理驱动图像编辑基准测试中，方法显著提升了整体性能，使社区模型能够与强大的专有模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: 以思考者为中心的优化在固定编辑器设置下具有实际应用潜力，通过分离规划与生成优化、双重反馈机制和精心设计的训练流程，有效解决了图像编辑中的复杂推理问题。

title: G-Loss: Graph-Guided Fine-Tuning of Language Models
summary: Traditional loss functions, including cross-entropy, contrastive, triplet, and su pervised contrastive losses, used for fine-tuning pre-trained language models such as BERT, operate only within local neighborhoods and fail to account for the global semantic structure. We present G-Loss, a graph-guided loss function that incorporates semi-supervised label propagation to use structural relationships within the embedding manifold. G-Loss builds a document-similarity graph that captures global semantic relationships, thereby guiding the model to learn more discriminative and robust embeddings. We evaluate G-Loss on five benchmark datasets covering key downstream classification tasks: MR (sentiment analysis), R8 and R52 (topic categorization), Ohsumed (medical document classification), and 20NG (news categorization). In the majority of experimental setups, G-Loss converges faster and produces semantically coherent embedding spaces, resulting in higher classification accuracy than models fine-tuned with traditional loss functions.

AI.tldr: G-Loss是一种图引导的损失函数，通过半监督标签传播利用嵌入流形中的结构关系，在多个文本分类任务中超越了传统损失函数，更快收敛并获得更高准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统的损失函数（如交叉熵、对比损失等）仅能在局部邻域内操作，无法考虑全局语义结构，限制了预训练语言模型学习判别性和鲁棒性嵌入的能力。
AI.method: G-Loss构建文档相似性图来捕获全局语义关系，结合半监督标签传播指导模型学习。该方法将图结构与损失函数相结合，在嵌入流形中利用结构化信息。
AI.result: 在MR、R8、R52、Ohsumed和20NG五个基准数据集的评估中，G-Loss在多数实验设置中收敛更快，产生语义连贯的嵌入空间，分类准确率高于使用传统损失函数的微调模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过融入全局语义结构信息，G-Loss有效改进了预训练语言模型的微调过程，为文本分类任务提供了一种更有效的学习范式，证明了结构化损失函数的重要性。

title: The Forensic Cost of Watermark Removal
comment: preprint; accepted at IH&MMSEC 2026, Special Session "Watermarking Across the Lifecycle of Generative Models"
summary: Current watermark removal methods are evaluated on two axes: attack success rate and perceptual quality. We show this is insufficient. While state-of-the-art attacks successfully degrade the watermark signal without visible distortion, they leave distinct statistical artifacts that betray the removal attempt. We name this overlooked axis Watermark Removal Detection (WRD) and demonstrate that a modern classifier trained on these artifacts achieves state-of-the-art detection rates at $10^{-3}$ FPR across every removal method tested. No existing attack accounts for this forensic leakage. We benchmark leading watermarking schemes against standard removal pipelines under the extended evaluation triple of attack success, perceptual quality, and forensic detectability, and find that no current method balances all three. Our results establish forensic stealthiness as a necessary requirement for watermark removal.

AI.tldr: 现有水印移除方法在攻击成功率和感知质量两个维度评估不够充分，本文发现了第三个被忽视的维度——水印移除检测(WRD)，证明了所有现有方法都会留下可被检测的统计痕迹，没有方法能同时平衡攻击成功、感知质量和法医隐匿性这三个要求。
AI.motivation: 当前水印移除方法主要关注攻击成功率和感知质量，但忽略了移除过程可能留下的统计痕迹，这些痕迹会暴露移除行为，导致评估标准不完整。
AI.method: 提出水印移除检测(WRD)概念，训练现代分类器检测移除痕迹，对主流水印方案和移除管道在三维评估框架(攻击成功、感知质量、法医可检测性)下进行基准测试。
AI.result: 分类器在10^-3错误虚警率下对所有测试的移除方法都能达到最先进的检测率，没有现有方案能够同时满足三个维度的要求。
AI.conclusion: 法医隐匿性应成为水印移除的必要要求，现有方法在隐蔽性方面存在根本缺陷，需要重新考虑水印移除技术的评估标准。

title: Luminol-AIDetect: Fast Zero-shot Machine-Generated Text Detection based on Perplexity under Text Shuffling
summary: Machine-generated text (MGT) detection requires identifying structurally invariant signals across generation models, rather than relying on model-specific fingerprints. In this respect, we hypothesize that while large language models excel at local semantic consistency, their autoregressive nature results in a specific kind of structural fragility compared to human writing. We propose Luminol-AIDetect, a novel, zero-shot statistical approach that exposes this fragility through coherence disruption. By applying a simple randomized text-shuffling procedure, we demonstrate that the resulting shift in perplexity serves as a principled, model-agnostic discriminant, as MGT displays a characteristic dispersion in perplexity-under-shuffling that differs markedly from the more stable structural variability of human-written text. Luminol-AIDetect leverages this distinction to inform its decision process, where a handful of perplexity-based scalar features are extracted from an input text and its shuffled version, then detection is performed via density estimation and ensemble-based prediction. Evaluated across 8 content domains, 11 adversarial attack types, and 18 languages, Luminol-AIDetect demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, with gains up to 17x lower FPR while being cheaper than prior methods.

AI.tldr: Luminol-AIDetect是一种零样本AI生成文本检测方法，通过随机扰乱文本结构的统计方法来区分机器生成文本与人写作文本，具有跨模型、跨语言的通用性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI文本检测方法依赖模型特定特征，而作者假设虽然大语言模型在局部语义一致性方面表现优异，但其自回归特性导致相比人类写作存在结构性脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出基于连贯性中断的统计方法Luminol-AIDetect，通过随机文本重排过程，利用困惑度漂移作为模型无关的判别指标，提取少量基于困惑度的标量特征，通过密度估计和集成预测进行检测。
AI.result: 在8个内容领域、11种对抗攻击类型和18种语言评估中显示出最先进性能，误报率最高降低17倍，且计算成本低于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功揭示了AI生成文本的结构性脆弱性特征，为通用、鲁棒的AI文本检测提供了新的思路和有效工具。

title: The Surprising Effectiveness of Canonical Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation
comment: Presented at Efficient Computer Vision (ECV) Workshop, CVPR 2026 (non-archival). 5 pages, 3 figures
summary: Recent knowledge distillation (KD) methods for semantic segmentation introduce increasingly complex hand-crafted objectives, yet are typically evaluated under fixed iteration schedules. These objectives substantially increase per-iteration cost, meaning equal iteration counts do not correspond to equal training budgets. It is therefore unclear whether reported gains reflect stronger distillation signals or simply greater compute. We show that iteration-based comparisons are misleading: when wall-clock compute is matched, \textit{canonical} logit- and feature-based KD outperform recent segmentation-specific methods. Under extended training, feature-based distillation achieves state-of-the-art ResNet-18 performance on Cityscapes and ADE20K. A PSPNet ResNet-18 student closely approaches its ResNet-101 teacher despite using only one quarter of the parameters, reaching 99\% of the teacher's mIoU on Cityscapes (79.0 vs.\ 79.8) and 92\% on ADE20K. Our results challenge the prevailing assumption that KD for segmentation requires task-specific mechanisms and suggest that scaling, rather than complex hand-crafted objectives, should guide future method design.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在匹配计算资源的情况下，传统的知识蒸馏方法在语义分割任务上优于近期提出的复杂方法，特征蒸馏通过扩展训练达到了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 近期语义分割知识蒸馏方法引入复杂的手工目标，但通常基于固定迭代次数评估。由于复杂目标大幅增加计算成本，传统迭代次数比较可能具有误导性，无法区分真实性能提升还是更多计算资源的结果。
AI.method: 通过匹配墙钟时间而非迭代次数进行公平比较，评估传统logit和特征知识蒸馏与近期分割特定方法的效果；对ResNet-18学生模型进行扩展训练，蒸馏来自ResNet-101教师模型的知识。
AI.result: 在匹配计算资源下，传统KD方法优于近期复杂方法；特征KD在Cityscapes和ADE20K上达到SOTA；ResNet-18学生达到教师99%（Cityscapes）和92%（ADE20K）的mIoU性能，仅用1/4参数。
AI.conclusion: 研究挑战了分割KD需要任务特定机制的假设，表明扩展训练而非复杂手工目标应指导未来方法设计，scale up比design up更有效。

title: From Syntax to Emotion: A Mechanistic Analysis of Emotion Inference in LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in emotionally sensitive human-AI applications, yet little is known about how emotion recognition is internally represented. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms of emotion recognition in LLMs using sparse autoencoders (SAEs). By analyzing sparse feature activations across layers, we identify a consistent three-phase information flow, in which emotion-related features emerge only in the final phase. We further show that emotion representations comprise both shared features across emotions and emotion-specific features. Using phase-stratified causal tracing, we identify a small set of features that strongly influence emotion predictions, and show that both their number and causal impact vary across emotions; in particular, Disgust is more weakly and diffusely represented than other emotions. Finally, we propose an interpretable and data-efficient causal feature steering method that significantly improves emotion recognition performance across multiple models while largely preserving language modeling ability, and demonstrate that these improvements generalize across multiple emotion recognition datasets. Overall, our findings provide a systematic analysis of the internal mechanisms underlying emotion recognition in LLMs and introduce an efficient, interpretable, and controllable approach for improving model performance.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用稀疏自编码器分析了大语言模型中情感识别的内部机制，发现了三相信息流模式，并提出了一种高效的因果特征引导方法来提升情感识别性能。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在情感敏感的人机交互应用中越来越广泛，但模型内部如何表示和识别情感的机制尚不清楚，理解这些内部机制对于提升模型性能和可控性至关重要。
AI.method: 研究人员采用稀疏自编码器(SAEs)技术分析LLM各层中的稀疏特征激活模式，通过相位分层因果追踪识别关键特征，并开发可解释的因果特征引导方法来改进情感识别。
AI.result: 研究发现情感识别包含三个阶段的信息流，情感相关特征只在最后阶段出现；情感表示包含共享特征和特定情感特征；厌恶情感的表示比其他情感更弱且更分散；提出的新方法显著提升了多模型和多数据集上的情感识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解LLM中情感识别的内部机制提供了系统分析，并引入了一种高效、可解释且可控的方法来改进模型性能，为开发更好的情感感知AI系统奠定了基础。

title: DualGeo: A Dual-View Framework for Worldwide Image Geo-localization
summary: Worldwide image geo-localization aims to infer the geographic location of an image captured anywhere on Earth, spanning street, city, regional, national, and continental scales. Existing methods rely on visual features that are sensitive to environmental variations (e.g., lighting, season, and weather) and lack effective post-processing to filter outlier candidates, limiting localization accuracy. To address these limitations, we propose DualGeo, a two-stage framework for worldwide image geo-localization. First, it establishes a geo-representational foundation by fusing image and semantic segmentation features via bidirectional cross-attention. The fused features are then aligned with GPS coordinates through dual-view contrastive learning to build a global retrieval database. Second, it performs geo-cognitive refinement by re-ranking retrieved candidates using geographic clustering. It then feeds them into large multimodal models (LMMs) for final coordinate prediction. Experiments on IM2GPS, IM2GPS3k, and YFCC4k show that DualGeo outperforms state-of-the-art methods, improving street-level (<1 km) and city-level (<25 km) localization accuracy by 3.6%-16.58% and 1.29%-8.77%, respectively. Our code and datasets are available : https://github.com/CJ310177/DualGeo.

AI.tldr: DualGeo是一个两阶段全球图像地理定位框架，通过多模态特征融合和地理聚类重排序，显著提升了街道级和城市级定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有图像地理定位方法存在两个主要问题：1)视觉特征对环境变化(光照、季节、天气)敏感；2)缺乏有效的后处理机制过滤异常候选，限制了定位精度。
AI.method: DualGeo采用两阶段框架：第一阶段通过双向交叉注意力融合图像与语义分割特征，并用双视角对比学习对齐GPS坐标构建全局检索数据库；第二阶段通过地理聚类对检索候选重排序，然后输入大型多模态模型进行最终坐标预测。
AI.result: 在IM2GPS、IM2GPS3k和YFCC4k数据集上，DualGeo相比SOTA方法，街道级(<1km)定位精度提升3.6%-16.58%，城市级(<25km)定位精度提升1.29%-8.77%。
AI.conclusion: DualGeo通过有效融合多模态特征和地理认知精炼，解决了现有方法的环境敏感性和后处理不足问题，为全球图像地理定位提供了新的解决方案。

title: Toward a Functional Geometric Algebra for Natural Language Semantics
comment: 43 pages. Keywords: geometric algebra, Clifford algebra, compositional semantics, natural language semantics, type coercion, multivector representations, graded type system, Generative Lexicon, neural language models, distributional semantics
summary: Distributional and neural approaches to natural language semantics have been built almost exclusively on conventional linear algebra: vectors, matrices, tensors, and the operations that accompany them. These methods have achieved remarkable empirical success, yet they face persistent structural limitations in compositional semantics, type sensitivity, and interpretability. I argue in this paper that geometric algebra (GA) -- specifically, Clifford algebras -- provides a mathematically superior foundation for semantic representation, and that a Functional Geometric Algebra (FGA) framework extends GA toward a typed, compositional semantics capable of supporting inference, transformation, and interpretability while retaining full compatibility with distributional learning and modern neural architectures. I develop the formal foundations, identify three core capabilities that GA provides and linear algebra does not, present a detailed worked example illustrating operator-level semantic contrasts, and show how GA-based operations already implicit in current transformer architectures can be made explicit and extended. The central claim is not merely increased dimensionality but increased structural organization: GA expands an $n$-dimensional embedding space into a $2^n$ multivector algebra where base semantic concepts and their higher-order interactions are represented within a single, principled algebraic framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用几何代数(GA)作为自然语言语义的数学基础，通过函数几何代数(FGA)框架实现类型化、可组合的语义表示，克服传统线性代数的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统的分布式和神经方法虽然成功，但在线性代数基础上面临组合语义、类型敏感性和可解释性等结构性限制，需要更强大的数学框架。
AI.method: 提出函数几何代数(FGA)框架，将几何代数(特别是Clifford代数)扩展为类型化、可组合的语义系统，与分布式学习和神经架构完全兼容。
AI.result: 识别了GA提供而线性代数所不具备的三个核心能力，通过具体示例展示了操作级语义对比，并揭示了transformer架构中隐含的GA操作。
AI.conclusion: GA的核心优势在于结构组织的提升：将n维嵌入空间扩展为2^n的多向量代数，使基础语义概念和高阶交互能在统一的代数框架中表示，为语义推理和可解释性提供更好的基础。

title: TopoMamba: Topology-Aware Scanning and Fusion for Segmenting Heterogeneous Medical Visual Media
summary: Visual state-space models (SSMs) have shown strong potential for medical image segmentation, yet their effectiveness is often limited by two practical issues: axis-biased scan ordering weakens the modeling of oblique and curved structures, and naive multi-branch fusion tends to amplify redundant responses. We present TopoMamba, a topology-aware scan-and-fuse framework for segmenting heterogeneous medical visual media. The method combines a diagonal/anti-diagonal TopoA-Scan branch with the standard Cross-Scan branch to provide complementary structural priors, and introduces ScanCache, a device-aware caching mechanism that amortizes explicit scan-index construction across recurring resolutions. To fuse heterogeneous scan features efficiently, we further propose a lightweight HSIC Gate that regulates branch interaction using a dependence-aware scalar gating rule. We also instantiate a volumetric TopoMamba-3D for practical 3D clinical segmentation. Experiments on Synapse CT, ISIC 2017 dermoscopy, and CVC-ClinicDB endoscopy show that TopoMamba consistently improves segmentation quality over strong CNN, Transformer, and SSM baselines, with particularly clear gains on thin or curved targets such as the pancreas and gallbladder, while maintaining favorable deployment efficiency under dynamic input resolutions. These results suggest that topology-aware scan ordering and lightweight dependence-aware fusion form an effective and practical design for medical multimedia segmentation. The code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: TopoMamba是一个拓扑感知的扫描融合框架，通过改进扫描顺序和融合机制解决了视觉状态空间模型在医学图像分割中的轴偏置和冗余响应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉状态空间模型在医学图像分割中受到两个重要限制：轴偏置扫描顺序削弱了对倾斜和曲线结构的建模能力，以及朴素多分支融合容易放大冗余响应。
AI.method: 提出结合对角线/反对角线的TopoA-Scan分支与标准Cross-Scan分支提供互补结构先验，引入ScanCache缓存机制优化扫描索引构建，设计轻量级HSIC Gate进行依赖感知的分支融合，并扩展实现了3D版本的TopoMamba-3D。
AI.result: 在Synapse CT、ISIC 2017皮肤镜和CVC-ClinicDB内窥镜数据集上，TopoMamba在胰腺和胆囊等薄或弯曲目标分割上取得显著提升，超越CNN、Transformer和SSM基线，同时保持较高的部署效率。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑感知的扫描顺序和轻量级依赖感知融合机制构成了医学多媒体分割的有效实用设计方案，为临床应用提供了新的技术路径。

title: A paradox of AI fluency
summary: How much does a user's skill with AI shape what AI actually delivers for them? This question is critical for users, AI product builders, and society at large, but it remains underexplored. Using a richly annotated sample of 27K transcripts from WildChat-4.8M, we show that fluent users take on more complex tasks than novices and adopt a fundamentally different interactional mode: they iterate collaboratively with the AI, refining goals and critically assessing outputs, whereas novices take a passive stance. These differences lead to a paradox of AI fluency: fluent users experience more failures than novices -- but their failures tend to be visible (a direct consequence of their engagement), they are more likely to lead to partial recovery, and they occur alongside greater success on complex tasks. Novices, by contrast, more often experience invisible failures: conversations that appear to end successfully but in fact miss the mark. Taken together, these results reframe what success with AI depends on. Individuals should adopt a stance of active engagement rather than passive acceptance. AI product builders should recognize that they are designing not just model behavior but user behavior; encouraging deep engagement, rather than friction-free experiences, will lead to more success overall. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/bigspinai/bigspin-fluency-outcomes

AI.tldr: 研究表明AI熟练用户与新手在交互方式上存在根本差异：熟练用户主动协作迭代，虽经历更多失败但成功率更高；新手常采取被动态度， experiencing invisible failures。这要求个人和产品开发者重新思考AI成功使用的策略。
AI.motivation: 探究用户AI技能水平如何影响AI实际表现，这一问题对用户、AI产品开发者及整个社会都至关重要，但目前缺乏深入研究。
AI.method: 基于WildChat-4.8M数据集中27K个精心标注的对话转录本进行实证分析，对比熟练用户与新手在任务复杂度、交互模式、失败类型和成功率等方面的差异。
AI.result: 发现熟练用户承担更复杂任务，采用主动协作的交互模式；虽然经历更多可见失败，但更有可能部分恢复，并在复杂任务上取得更大成功。新手更多经历隐形失败，即表面上成功但实际未达目标的对话。
AI.conclusion: AI成功取决于用户主动参与而非被动接受，产品开发者应认识到他们在设计用户行为而不只是模型行为，鼓励深度参与而非无摩擦体验将带来更好的整体效果。

title: Vision SmolMamba: Spike-Guided Token Pruning for Energy-Efficient Spiking State-Space Vision Models
summary: Spiking Transformers have shown strong potential for long-range visual modeling through spike-driven self-attention. However, their quadratic token interactions remain fundamentally misaligned with the sparse and event-driven nature of spiking neural computation. To address this limitation, we propose Vision SmolMamba, an energy-efficient spiking state-space architecture that integrates spike-driven dynamics with linear-time selective recurrence. The key idea is a Spike-Guided Spatio-Temporal Token Pruner (SST-TP), which estimates token importance using both spike activation strength and first-spike latency. This mechanism progressively removes redundant tokens while preserving salient spatio-temporal information, enabling efficient scaling with token sparsity. Based on this mechanism, the proposed SmolMamba block incorporates spike events directly into bidirectional state-space recurrence, forming a spiking state-space vision backbone for efficient long-range modeling. Extensive experiments on both static and event-based benchmarks, including ImageNet-1K, CIFAR10/100, CIFAR10-DVS, and DVS128 Gesture, demonstrate that Vision SmolMamba consistently achieves superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. In particular, it reduces the estimated energy cost by at least 1.5x compared with prior spiking Transformer baselines and a Spiking Mamba variant while maintaining competitive or improved accuracy. These results demonstrate that combining spike-guided token sparsity with state-space modeling offers a scalable and energy-efficient paradigm for spiking vision systems.

AI.tldr: Vision SmolMamba是一种结合脉冲引导token稀疏性和线性时间状态空间模型的脉冲视觉架构，实现了更高效的长距离视觉建模。
AI.motivation: 现有的Spike Transformer虽然展现了长距离视觉建模的潜力，但其二次方token交互机制与脉冲神经计算的稀疏性和事件驱动特性存在根本性不匹配。
AI.method: 提出脉冲引导的时空token剪枝器(SST-TP)，利用脉冲激活强度和首次脉冲延迟来估计token重要性，并基于此构建SmolMamba块，将脉冲事件直接整合到双向状态空间递归中。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K、CIFAR10/100等多个静态和事件驱动基准测试中，Vision SmolMamba在保持竞争力的准确率的同时，将能耗成本降低了至少1.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 结合脉冲引导的token稀疏性与状态空间建模，为脉冲视觉系统提供了一种可扩展且节能的新范式。

title: DV-World: Benchmarking Data Visualization Agents in Real-World Scenarios
summary: Real-world data visualization (DV) requires native environmental grounding, cross-platform evolution, and proactive intent alignment. Yet, existing benchmarks often suffer from code-sandbox confinement, single-language creation-only tasks, and assumption of perfect intent. To bridge these gaps, we introduce DV-World, a benchmark of 260 tasks designed to evaluate DV agents across real-world professional lifecycles. DV-World spans three domains: DV-Sheet for native spreadsheet manipulation including chart and dashboard creation as well as diagnostic repair; DV-Evolution for adapting and restructuring reference visual artifacts to fit new data across diverse programming paradigms and DV-Interact for proactive intent alignment with a user simulator that mimics real-world ambiguous requirements. Our hybrid evaluation framework integrates Table-value Alignment for numerical precision and MLLM-as-a-Judge with rubrics for semantic-visual assessment. Experiments reveal that state-of-the-art models achieve less than 50% overall performance, exposing critical deficits in handling the complex challenges of real-world data visualization. DV-World provides a realistic testbed to steer development toward the versatile expertise required in enterprise workflows. Our data and code are available at \href{https://github.com/DA-Open/DV-World}{this project page}.

AI.tldr: DV-World是一个包含260个任务的现实世界数据可视化基准测试，涵盖原生电子表格操作、跨平台演进和主动意图对齐三个领域，评估显示当前最先进模型的整体性能不足50%。
AI.motivation: 现有数据可视化基准存在代码沙箱限制、单一语言创建任务和完美意图假设等问题，无法真实反映现实世界中数据可视化的复杂性，包括环境原生性、跨平台演化和主动意图对齐等需求。
AI.method: 构建了DV-World基准测试，包含三个领域：DV-Sheet（原生电子表格操作）、DV-Evolution（跨编程范式的视觉工件适配重构）和DV-Interact（模拟真实模糊需求的主动意图对齐），并采用混合评估框架结合数值对齐和MLLM评判。
AI.result: 实验表明最先进模型的整体性能低于50%，暴露了在处理复杂数据可视化挑战方面的关键缺陷，验证了基准测试的有效性和现实性。
AI.conclusion: DV-World为数据可视化智能体提供了现实的测试平台，有助于推动开发 enterprise 工作流所需的多样化专业技能，填补了现实世界数据可视化评估的空白。

title: Control Your Queries: Heterogeneous Query Interaction for Camera-Radar Fusion
summary: In autonomous driving, camera-radar fusion offers complementary sensing and low deployment cost. Existing methods perform fusion through input mixing, feature map mixing, or query-based feature sampling. We propose a new fusion paradigm, termed heterogeneous query interaction, and present ConFusion, a camera-radar 3D object detector. ConFusion combines image queries, radar queries, and learnable world queries distributed in 3D space to improve query initialization and object coverage. To encourage cross-type interaction among heterogeneous queries, we introduce heterogeneous query mixing (QMix), which performs dedicated cross-type attention after feature sampling to consolidate complementary object evidence. We further propose interactive query swap sampling (QSwap), which improves feature sampling by allowing related queries to exchange informative feature tokens under attention and geometric constraints. Experiments on the nuScenes dataset show that ConFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance, reaching 59.1 mAP and 65.6 NDS on the validation set, and 61.6 mAP and 67.9 NDS on the test set.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的相机-雷达融合范式ConFusion，通过异构查询交互实现3D目标检测，在nuScenes数据集上达到了59.1 mAP和65.6 NDS的state-of-the-art性能。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶中，相机-雷达融合能提供互补的感知能力和较低的部署成本。现有方法通过输入混合、特征图混合或基于查询的特征采样进行融合，但存在局限性，需要一种更有效的融合方式。
AI.method: ConFusion结合图像查询、雷达查询和分布在3D空间的可学习世界查询来改进查询初始化和目标覆盖。引入异构查询混合(QMix)进行分类间注意力交互，提出交互式查询交换采样(QSwap)在注意力和几何约束下允许相关查询交换信息特征标记。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集验证集上达到59.1 mAP和65.6 NDS，在测试集上达到61.6 mAP和67.9 NDS，实现了state-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的异构查询交互范式有效地融合了相机和雷达的互补信息，通过QMix和QSwap等创新机制显著提升了3D目标检测性能，为低成本高精度的自动驾驶感知系统提供了新的解决方案。

title: Refinement via Regeneration: Enlarging Modification Space Boosts Image Refinement in Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) integrate visual understanding and generation within a single framework. For text-to-image (T2I) tasks, this unified capability allows UMMs to refine outputs after their initial generation, potentially extending the performance upper bound. Current UMM-based refinement methods primarily follow a refinement-via-editing (RvE) paradigm, where UMMs produce editing instructions to modify misaligned regions while preserving aligned content. However, editing instructions often describe prompt-image misalignment only coarsely, leading to incomplete refinement. Moreover, pixel-level preservation, though necessary for editing, unnecessarily restricts the effective modification space for refinement. To address these limitations, we propose Refinement via Regeneration (RvR), a novel framework that reformulates refinement as conditional image regeneration rather than editing. Instead of relying on editing instructions and enforcing strict content preservation, RvR regenerates images conditioned on the target prompt and the semantic tokens of the initial image, enabling more complete semantic alignment with a larger modification space. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of RvR, improving Geneval from 0.78 to 0.91, DPGBench from 84.02 to 87.21, and UniGenBench++ from 61.53 to 77.41.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的图像精炼框架RvR，通过条件式图像再生而非编辑来改进文本到图像任务的生成质量，在多个基准测试中取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 当前基于统一多模态模型(UMMs)的图像精炼方法主要通过编辑指令进行局部修改，但这种方法存在两个主要问题：编辑指令描述粗糙导致精炼不完整，以及像素级保留限制了有效修改空间。
AI.method: 提出Refinement via Regeneration (RvR)框架，将精炼重新定义为条件式图像再生。该方法不依赖编辑指令和严格内容保留，而是基于目标提示词和初始图像的语义tokens重新生成图像，从而实现更完整的语义对齐和更大的修改空间。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著提升性能：Geneval从0.78提升到0.91，DPGBench从84.02提升到87.21，UniGenBench++从61.53提升到77.41。
AI.conclusion: RvR框架通过再生而非编辑的方式，有效解决了传统精炼方法的局限性，在保持图像质量的同时实现了更完整和灵活的内容精炼，为统一多模态模型的图像生成精炼任务提供了新的解决思路。

title: Toward Multimodal Conversational AI for Age-Related Macular Degeneration
summary: Despite strong performance of deep learning models in retinal disease detection, most systems produce static predictions without clinical reasoning or interactive explanation. Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) integrate diagnostic predictions with clinically meaningful dialogue to support clinical decision-making and patient counseling. In this study, OcularChat, an MLLM, was fine-tuned from Qwen2.5-VL using simulated patient-physician dialogues to diagnose age-related macular degeneration (AMD) through visual question answering on color fundus photographs (CFPs). A total of 705,850 simulated dialogues paired with 46,167 CFPs were generated to train OcularChat to identify key AMD features and produce reasoned predictions. OcularChat demonstrated strong classification performance in AREDS, achieving accuracies of 0.954, 0.849, and 0.678 for the three diagnostic tasks: advanced AMD, pigmentary abnormalities, and drusen size, significantly outperforming existing MLLMs. On AREDS2, OcularChat remained the top-performing method on all tasks. Across three independent ophthalmologist graders, OcularChat achieved higher mean scores than a strong baseline model for advanced AMD (3.503 vs. 2.833), pigmentary abnormalities (3.272 vs. 2.828), drusen size (3.064 vs. 2.433), and overall impression (2.978 vs. 2.464) on a 5-point clinical grading rubric. Beyond strong objective performance in AMD severity classification, OcularChat demonstrated the ability to provide diagnostic reasoning, clinically relevant explanations, and interactive dialogue, with high performance in subjective ophthalmologist evaluation. These findings suggest that MLLMs may enable accurate, interpretable, and clinically useful image-based diagnosis and classification of AMD.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了名为OcularChat的眼科多模态大语言模型，通过模拟医患对话进行微调，能在彩色眼底照片上进行AMD诊断，不仅分类性能优异，还能提供临床推理和交互式解释。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度学习视网膜疾病检测系统大多只给出静态预测结果，缺乏临床推理过程或交互式解释能力，限制了其在临床决策和患者咨询中的应用价值。
AI.method: 基于Qwen2.5-VL模型微调开发了OcularChat，使用46,167张彩色眼底照片生成了705,850个模拟医患对话对进行训练，使模型能够识别AMD关键特征并产生有推理的预测结果。
AI.result: OcularChat在AREDS数据集上AMD三项诊断任务的准确率分别达到0.954、0.849和0.678，显著优于现有MLLM模型；在AREDS2数据集上也保持最佳性能；在眼科医师评分中，OcularChat在各个维度均优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: MLLM技术能够实现准确、可解释且临床实用的基于图像的AMD诊断分类，OcularChat证明了在保持高性能的同时还能提供诊断推理、临床相关解释和交互对话的能力。

title: Prefill-Time Intervention for Mitigating Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in visual-textual understanding, yet their reliability is critically undermined by hallucinations, i.e., the generation of factually incorrect or inconsistent responses. While recent studies using steering vectors demonstrated promise in reducing hallucinations, a notable challenge remains: they inadvertently amplify the severity of residual hallucinations. We attribute this to their exclusive focus on the decoding stage, where errors accumulate autoregressively and progressively worsen subsequent hallucinatory outputs. To address this, we propose Prefill-Time Intervention (PTI), a novel steering paradigm that intervenes only once during the prefill stage, enhancing the initial Key-Value (KV) cache before error accumulation occurs. Specifically, PTI is modality-aware, deriving distinct directions for visual and textual representations. This intervention is decoupled to steer keys toward visually-grounded objects and values to filter background noise, correcting hallucination-prone representations at their source. Extensive experiments demonstrate PTI's significant performance in mitigating hallucinations and its generalizability across diverse decoding strategies, LVLMs, and benchmarks. Moreover, PTI is orthogonal to existing decoding-stage methods, enabling plug-and-play integration and further boosting performance. Code is available at: https://github.com/huaiyi66/PTI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Prefill-Time Intervention (PTI)方法，通过在预填充阶段一次性干预视觉-语言模型的KV缓存来减少幻觉，相比解码阶段干预更有效且不会放大残余幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有使用引导向量减少LVLM幻觉的方法存在关键缺陷：虽然能减少部分幻觉，但会无意中放大残余幻觉的严重性，这是因为它们仅在解码阶段干预，而错误会自回归地累积并恶化后续的幻觉输出。
AI.method: PTI是一种新型引导范式，在预填充阶段仅进行一次干预，增强初始KV缓存在错误累积之前的有效性。该方法具有模态感知特性，为视觉和文本表示推导不同的方向，解耦式地引导键向量朝向视觉基础对象，同时引导值向量过滤背景噪声，从源头上纠正易产生幻觉的表示。
AI.result: 大量实验证明PTI在减少幻觉方面表现显著，且在不同解码策略、LVLM模型和基准测试中都具有良好的泛化能力。此外，PTI与现有解码阶段方法正交，可实现即插即用集成并进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: PTI通过改变干预时机从解码阶段转向预填充阶段，有效解决了现有方法放大残余幻觉的问题，为提升LVLM的可靠性提供了新的技术路径，具有较强的实用价值和推广前景。

title: SAMe: A Semantic Anatomy Mapping Engine for Robotic Ultrasound
comment: Supplementary information included. Code will be released at https://github.com/MiliLab/Echo-SAMe
summary: Robotic ultrasound has advanced local image-driven control, contact regulation, and view optimization, yet current systems lack the anatomical understanding needed to determine what to scan, where to begin, and how to adapt to individual patient anatomy. These gaps make systems still reliant on expert intervention to initiate scanning. Here we present SAMe, a semantic anatomy mapping engine that provides robotic ultrasound with an explicit anatomical prior layer. SAMe addresses scan initiation as a target-to-anatomy-to-action process: it grounds under-specified clinical complaints into structured target organs, instantiates a patient-specific anatomical representation for the grounded targets from a single external body image, and translates this representation into control-facing 6-DoF probe initialization states without any additional registration using preoperative CT or MRI. The anatomical representation maintained by SAMe is explicit, lightweight (single-organ inference in 0.08s), and compatible with downstream control by design. Across semantic grounding, anatomical instantiation, and real-robot evaluation, SAMe shows strong performance across the full initialization pipeline. In real-robot experiments, SAMe achieved overall organ-hit rates of 97.3% for liver initialization and 81.7% for kidney initialization across the evaluated target sets. Even when restricted to the centroid target, SAMe outperformed the surface-heuristic baseline for both liver and kidney initialization. These results establish an explicit anatomical prior layer that addresses scan initialization and is designed to support broader downstream autonomous scanning pipelines, providing the anatomical foundation for complaint-driven, anatomically informed robotic ultrasonography.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了SAMe语义解剖映射引擎，为机器人超声提供解剖先验层，能够将临床主诉转化为目标器官，基于单张外部身体图像构建患者特异性解剖表示，并将其转化为6-DoF探头初始化状态，实现高成功率的自主扫描启动。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人超声系统缺乏解剖学理解能力，无法自主确定扫描目标、起始位置和适应患者个体解剖差异，仍依赖专家干预来启动扫描，限制了系统的自主性。
AI.method: SAMe采用目标-解剖-行动的三步流程：1)语义 grounding 将临床主诉转化为结构化目标器官；2)从单张外部身体图像实例化患者特异性解剖表示；3)将解剖表示直接转换为面向控制的6-DoF探头初始化状态，无需额外的术前CT/MRI配准。
AI.result: 在语义理解、解剖实例化和真实机器人评估中表现出色。真实机器人实验中，肝脏初始化命中率达97.3%，肾脏初始化命中率达81.7%，即使在仅使用质心目标的限制条件下也优于表面启发式基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SAMe建立了一个显式解剖先验层，解决了扫描初始化问题，为更广泛的下游自主扫描流水线提供了解剖学基础，奠定了基于主诉驱动、解剖学知情的机器人超声检查的技术基础。

title: Exploring Remote Photoplethysmography for Neonatal Pain Detection from Facial Videos
comment: 25 pages, 9 figures, 10 tables. Proposed rPPG-based method for neonatal pain detection from facial videos, with multimodal (rPPG + audio) analysis and extensive ablation studies on the iCOPEvid dataset
summary: Unaddressed pain in neonates can lead to adverse effects, including delayed development and slower weight gain, emphasising the need for more objective and reliable pain assessment methods. Hence, automated methods using behavioural and physiological pain indicators have been developed to aid healthcare professionals in the Neonatal ICU. Traditional contact-based methods for physiological parameter estimation are unsuitable for long-term monitoring and increase the risk of spreading diseases like COVID-19. We introduce a novel approach using remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) to estimate pulse signals in a non-contact manner and employ them for neonatal pain detection. The temporal signals acquired from regions-of-interest (ROIs) affected by skin deformations may exhibit lower quality and provide erroneous rPPG signals. Therefore, we incorporated a quality parameter to select the temporal signals obtained from ROIs that are least affected by skin deformations. Further, we employed signal-to-noise ratio as a fitness parameter to extract the rPPG signal corresponding to the clip that is least affected by noise. Experimental findings demonstrate that the rPPG signals provide useful information for neonatal pain detection, and signals extracted from the blue colour channel outperform those extracted from other colour channels. We also show that combining rPPG and audio features provides better results than individual modalities.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于远程光电容积脉搏波(rPPG)的非接触式新生儿疼痛检测方法，结合语音特征并采用信号质量参数优化，有效克服了传统接触式检测的局限性。
AI.motivation: 新生儿未缓解的疼痛会导致发育迟缓等不良后果，而传统的接触式生理参数监测不适合长期观察且增加疾病传播风险（如COVID-19），因此需要开发更安全客观的自动化疼痛评估方法。
AI.method: 采用远程光电容积脉搏波技术非接触式估计脉搏信号，引入质量参数选择受皮肤变形影响最小的感兴趣区域时间信号，使用信噪比作为适应度参数提取受噪声影响最小的rPPG信号，并融合音频特征进行疼痛检测。
AI.result: 实验表明rPPG信号为新生儿疼痛检测提供有效信息，蓝色通道提取的信号性能最优，rPPG与音频特征融合的结果优于单一模态。
AI.conclusion: 非接触式rPPG技术在新生儿疼痛检测中具有应用潜力，通过信号质量优化和多模态融合可实现更准确可靠的疼痛评估，为临床提供安全有效的监测手段。

title: QB-LIF: Learnable-Scale Quantized Burst Neurons for Efficient SNNs
summary: Binary spike coding enables sparse and event-driven computation in spiking neural networks (SNNs), yet its 1-bit-per-timestep representation fundamentally limits information throughput. This bottleneck becomes increasingly restrictive in deep architectures under short simulation horizons. We propose the Quantized Burst-LIF (QB-LIF) neuron, which reformulates burst spiking as a saturated uniform quantization of membrane potentials with a learnable scale. Instead of relying on predefined multi-threshold structures, QB-LIF treats the quantization scale as a trainable parameter, allowing each layer to autonomously adapt its spiking resolution to the underlying membrane-potential statistics. To preserve hardware efficiency, we introduce an absorbable scale strategy that folds the learned quantized scale into synaptic weights during inference, maintaining a strict accumulate-only (AC) execution paradigm. To enable stable optimization in the discrete multi-level space, we further design ReLSG-ET, a rectified-linear surrogate gradient with exponential tails that sustains gradient flow across burst intervals. Extensive experiments on static (CIFAR-10/100, ImageNet) and event-driven (CIFAR10-DVS, DVS128-Gesture) benchmarks demonstrate that QB-LIF consistently outperforms binary and fixed-burst SNNs, achieving higher accuracy under ultra-low latency while preserving neuromorphic compatibility.

AI.tldr: Quantized Burst-LIF (QB-LIF)神经元将脉冲爆发建模为膜电位饱和均匀量化，通过可学习量化尺度自适应调节分辨率，在保持神经形态兼容性的同时显著提升了SNN在超低延迟下的信息吞吐量和性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SNN的二进制脉冲编码每时间步仅能传输1位信息，在深度架构的短时仿真中严重限制了信息吞吐量，成为性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出QB-LIF神经元模型，将脉冲爆发视为膜电位的饱和均匀量化，量化尺度作为可训练参数使各层自适应调节；引入可吸收尺度策略在推理时将量化尺度折叠到突触权重中保持仅累加(AC)执行模式；设计ReLSG-ET反向传播方法优化离散多级空间训练。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet等静态数据集和CIFAR10-DVS、DVS128-Gesture等事件驱动基准测试中，QB-LIF在超低延迟条件下均优于二进制和固定爆发SNN，实现了更高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: QB-LIF通过创新的量化爆发机制有效突破了二进制编码的信息瓶颈，为SNN在深度架构中的高效低延迟应用提供了新思路，同时保持了神经形态硬件的兼容性。

title: Sketch2Arti: Sketch-based Articulation Modeling of CAD Objects
